name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyErPHjDHdlYSr0wSA2xxvHvkDarW6FUdtuBxcbh9CNlBpCZv6AHu9D1HnwjAommWVmUsn-TtWnR2SwCHTnCOZaxQgzy-oY4ts7snYdoBqoPb7OCdvQ5A3uLVGRUk6mMN5Yow9Ohn5g4JlmytzBLBNdao%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEkNB9J6683JsdK-yVFnFF5TuMspPxRzAycCkR5siK8rBuiytxZN0_OhyT68OBq_Jk7_6cRb8BT5TMozTbz549daWBI1nA7KU1hl1U55ZzrXVdu5OuD85NAcjU1DLk4FZu9RbefIy-4Rd-R9AjOtzf5s%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEjXg7wpuh6nL-DOKA7l49HCnhQZhDMe5jm4Zfd1g_hRL3EJSA86znv-S8sw-IQ3nCjqebYNl47fvHC4k-Ejy6UIHofHeolKXEQ8Q7r8z5IEA_--0KhtcRe3dSsvoek7Ooz7lKYRsRM4qmJAGsyKS12U%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEiKVBebcnKs3AtWrUzRA-Vnw9hp4TVUYsgH_CRNIfM2U2pOAj1b75w_-pb0j3C5gS-M7qfZHUXR4du-_cqvPEr2Lv_4fqc2yyNtqBITK5631G5blqj1jHnBsoUcAEHnLo2HgtBaJgL-WworYML2FQaU%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEozqtvl1qekhf24m4Zygng40jBtmdupqRpmbByDIkVlKpjGNKtPC2lSYUJWR5Tl26K4Mi8MwXH3ARYZfj38sBJpn0wAxY2h_m5DtCtAd4aqchaRwOfnX07hu88KfwYbllnQeM2AJJc0QCTah2dflGis%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEnxpYeqyCNb5wkjA44u43BwTbaSDdcnPnTjuEfmm1ljc_tgQNEQBozwzSjAWXAFoKzjFLqa9v-KEsDPJ6-3MtWoCmkT3flrmPvo73IdwzqEhtGPuYMyeumtT5gnhht9jDgvQZb51lAuitgAfV9q6bEY%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEq1F7PK9W3DjYOliwcfb-IYBBIRzNiT0qWMSBOQ8etBmg_Q37VEPaILeUWizX57lGg6GIUcE3stPeSnAY6Z1PrXOXrlLJQJLRfj-kYXxW-G3VzE5FN7OJEnM_bj_-Y7rwPca3JUTLcfYYbc3tv3ljbM%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEgduCt7zhlrMjhmPizSsFKgGxuCTu7QprlY2hm1kRrekGhG-8d0dMO8rSFN_JhK7u5gkCd7mq-iakRDJOxFDaol663u9jiFb4oejoC2YuaAC9i6NJXZyHHgha6g9O_hcoEJqzFC2etvSDAQlYLLhOc4%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcUagWPFaIs1kue1xyROImvbi2LTsBKfkkJzXqLcoB3T4RR3cDVgd035tctiHJp9hO7-_l6PxpeFLbdri5B9iTC4hfAC8GMaUCuQFsFwrKyzb4K9-ylcCNHyZ2Et5pGQKl9oflTl-KLTBjvl86PO5VZPBvxLUlfRh3zPp0IOH_d-7A%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=990c8f31ccf84e4bb48b2bad10f6ec0f&_e=atnwDLcfKmMhSas9Dh7OorWze8KXuYUvi7ApQL2x8JVoxSL-FKYtg0ikuR4gsmeifbBGvhhbTvVT1ki9NFbaSe95uB6ql0S2lZhmQ3VHNY9mSRULA36rL5dA8V3bsVcU2HG3tzhF3wpxKuzzHUbyEgs0TGKUdAG02PWUo5i1jQmCRph1YluZQDslnAN6dR1YWstneRqYz_LNAPsCWBbgQu6MHvl8PvvUIxJwNyZgT73Qgj6bQg7Qzri2pZ8wbpSWIbrkS45gvEl3j6CQmaU-ujZbEgDmd72PTyaf0cgMij8%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Friend,
At the end of June, I attended the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters in the _FIRST-IN-THE-NATION_ primary state of New Hampshire.
While I was touring the building and thanking our many staffers and volunteers, I noticed a big wall that looked a bit empty.
I thought to myself - you know what would be great there...
_**... a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign.**_
And I don't mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within.
I'd love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I'm asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall.
_But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I'll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque._

clean_body: I had a great idea when I attended the grand opening... | | | Friend, At the end of June, I attended the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters in the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION primary state of New Hampshire. While I was touring the building and thanking our many staffers and volunteers, I noticed a big wall that looked a bit empty. I thought to myself - you know what would be great there... ... a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign. And I don't mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. I'd love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I'm asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I'll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque. ci-cgv-20230708 Thank you, | Donald J. name: Mark Robinson
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44cf57dd3589450bb207445f0ee4a629&_e=oFY1-sLDMrQxXO2W-VygmsBEv5AB9KA_tx0lx8-IZiASeQKbksRCHV9sN0GFdGJ1WL9MHfcJjvFXgE-3BEe3t-f0QBJfbvJUYVz0Y0QvuwhKqb702o0SpRrc5hnOC8kwKNwddHkEeXybCplmXhzJ1Ssipq9uS2VPMTDXPJxtETCHhsSc1N4YdJrtx3VpRjSBZbaxl2arjD3jVThROCijmN3tHzJfFCwJ4MFGCpacbKoPiyPqTA5WU4QwEh2-TOnz1qDfzMY5Y5LFMP8xF6dN64YqOhk7GmQNAxHb7kSxKGYx-yhI8JyamcoyIM8Ox2OSG9FfXkPyL55-cb7YVvvNyq6DJUhSm7Ja9Ndv53ecWoDG8Bw_YhcLMR_5Bri7wad9BCEX0SMHaAby8PZAJO7VRY_5zoqTo3bHvNr7WN45rbvCN1FRFkLxnU833rB0dZudHAW4b8RKeRqXioQjneGypVZGxM2FI4UvAYNBfOB11jo%3D)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn't my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44cf57dd3589450bb207445f0ee4a629&_e=oFY1-sLDMrQxXO2W-VygmsBEv5AB9KA_tx0lx8-IZiASeQKbksRCHV9sN0GFdGJ1WL9MHfcJjvFXgE-3BEe3t-f0QBJfbvJUYVz0Y0QvuwhKqb702o0SpRrc5hnOC8kwKNwddHkEeXybCplmXhzJ1Ssipq9uS2VPMTDXPJxtETCHhsSc1N4YdJrtx3VpRjSBZbaxl2arjD3jVThROCijmN3tHzJfFCwJ4MFGCpacbKoPiyPqTA5WU4QwEh2-TOnz1qDfzMY5Y5LFMP8xF6dN64YqOhk7GmQNAxHb7kSxKGYx-yhI8JyamcoyIM8Ox2OSLG3U0n2t_OINgPBxk6341kFOLZB7tGJ3zIWN8TMyTChZnah4bXYioYj-z-4hfqy8TNQfhooGHWu2qII2IauqQLJBeiCf_BU6Hsh6g6fG_-92I7r6tEplVM3VmskKSZJktXpWEDQbdwy7q15fA0Z_t_w9Ml0ol-_dB0O9EHuFknk%3D)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44cf57dd3589450bb207445f0ee4a629&_e=oFY1-sLDMrQxXO2W-VygmsBEv5AB9KA_tx0lx8-IZiASeQKbksRCHV9sN0GFdGJ1WL9MHfcJjvFXgE-3BEe3t-f0QBJfbvJUYVz0Y0QvuwhKqb702o0SpRrc5hnOC8kwKNwddHkEeXybCplmXhzJ1Ssipq9uS2VPMTDXPJxtETCHhsSc1N4YdJrtx3VpRjSBZbaxl2arjD3jVThROCijmN3tHzJfFCwJ4MFGCpacbKoPiyPqTA5WU4QwEh2-TOnz1qDfzMY5Y5LFMP8xF6dN64YqOhk7GmQNAxHb7kSxKGYx-yhI8JyamcoyIM8Ox2OSlH2QcSCtFMkN2C8IpEeJN40rV5ucq7vCi5rKOjMYeTVn8sUoNyvh58t0Mmomk65hXoHrSEe7o15Mhll6jN6FQLfkD8672xMHKdKrC0MaFg8Pxy2PFj_CVX00plTOqIrU_ThmISJTQ7CyiDWBAkSLUNnMDzHNjrWz9C9sRdOKfMY%3D)
---

Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor.

Now, I'm asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it's $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44cf57dd3589450bb207445f0ee4a629&_e=oFY1-sLDMrQxXO2W-VygmsBEv5AB9KA_tx0lx8-IZiASeQKbksRCHV9sN0GFdGJ1WL9MHfcJjvFXgE-3BEe3t-f0QBJfbvJUYVz0Y0QvuwhKqb702o0SpRrc5hnOC8kwKNwddHkEeXybCplmXhzJ1Ssipq9uS2VPMTDXPJxtETCHhsSc1N4YdJrtx3VpRjSBZbaxl2arjD3jVThROCijmN3tHzJfFCwJ4MFGCpacbKoPiyPqTA5WU4QwEh2-TOnz1qDfzMY5Y5LFMP8xF6dN64YqOhk7GmQNAxHb7kSxKGYx-yhI8JyamcoyIM8Ox2OSx_JIKm8zmnEyWFT5_ilSTgZLsVEcL69B43AyKnXvKfGA91-90wwfZ3qqpaiucS8dtv0eCRKtyiLTirF35dSAVtEbVsG64RM6q9TF4SihSMJy3hj_l7swwJuPCwM-K4s-vvJBTnsUy1VQ3yUqyWUKANSVyAYaxXsdlySjBB5fG8c%3D "Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_

---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27yt5mHUL44Fr2f-wKTtT-3T09eDNhjnAHT5n3JvHWLdTeoi1i0UZ4nJGJKM-HHS-LA1ohmbXxHAAJoMc5xEUua0c1xRMKkbBPTNA4nM36Ya5LGiampObN-CUT2VjRUtJDH2s0-n5N4D78DDk8bUjWULTxxRK9jbdk-xykwyoSRyE%3D)
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA279FueSgU4vcEABBN2SAVOA34wRNqNJv_8eJ5CDoJyIRGbqkuj9akC9NpYqa3gxyr8mW4Plu60jWC0iIp1n7KMUT8E06M8frP8AI2rlCfHY9dIlOT0HKFg7M55DI-e_D28gK2cg8W0uXGkmlClNBIP4gNK9YdaVCkeKsvmp0SdpUI%3D)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27HqBnU8f7dgvcggjNSZ5GT5yCSaYIN_04s0xsCsc1cvx9HSdynGzo6I7CYu4U4JWsU5ZkZ_aphMeDWawmR146tFV4iotUOgG4TblQma3MlJeat_wUXLEIN13pI-Ctq0wAeBwVWlaH1TLiOv65Nu9e5o55HD9hVEnY0Aq8KYmwuMw%3D)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27PaaKDcKZAcurb8hFF753qik9x4Sx-da5VE1nmQedn3pFaKKYHnhYbGjp01DPMKj7VNGZUyls4bOND6bZDDnY2MfL19M9cVAywmOBkrC8wkpb0VU1Fx4CFNZkFMsw4g5ywfUYLPKIB-MmAlPXeRXNvkv31zm78ZSPgMgpdYfPlWk%3D)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27n6vMiyv1QXca5IwaRfCf3xlZ1du-pGpms0uEP4ThTcpaNSbCDr55Q9Of4GVwydrOOyfmuoXU6S3sNiNY80ffIpv4YvGm5dMXwc7mu7uOYB9yKwmzY3VNH0UD3MX_BrFuH-86wJ5_8LyTcCAfXaIE14M8RIhzr6h79Gh7Aviw4kM%3D)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27l361LVE3m8azVfZmo8TFg5EGn2gVL0qZQMMbp36LVAJXGKNiZuDr47sMrfcS-IhkXP_sSmemvYtZOHyI2OT8cgBpG39NNKsjBk6-R09eOL9suWqqJx-xl_4NZaEe2WYbegigbxuPWiCF33RmwkxHxyfnhVV9UbbZsKdjW0zn-0Y%3D)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27jPzpidmdScGxk5qexTRMQsRdJ2aNQWweDg_zyWSCfYMdPSm93zfSKo9hUdn49T3NZNu6KyjxiNf_2KI4NssdcIJ7AhtGbmNMgpTacC966XesuBm8qv-hzbDcgW6H-yVC-Wfxb46Psvd64b_nnSIxUz5XoXRRKGIXLa3Hbx_784A%3D)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84e7159949bd47c6b31c99873988d2f9&_e=YydGhjmFoKj9L9zAL1T1-nZRUwMMmPYCJilq0ivHA0uT5wvOdyhWu0bRfjm4Sq37ZzyuRDoLcA8jrkd_4qSunrDP3Do1Wu-2FWMq91wJv6OJpWkI17pZsA4KMoH5xGRdJuSePqpnj2aJXhCI4YrOxoM_dodrGJ45CI_kBcWBlH_YiXlWaYrlRXnZbmJbsA27epQM7BGQtnvIq-F1J2PcM6TSftLdwhDI716ETtWiAEeXQ6uIWWz2Oi1otOgXIHkr1ziB5GjHbo6DKpKKXgwKDRh9yvh95RdqR23GsbrGU1V0WxgutGqVhIl_Gwr6ycrD6JFRjiHK6gqhzjZ-2OXSjF1Wou0FvF1Vg7G6C7miqXs%3D)**.

My narrow victory in 2022 put a BIG target on my back…and now reports indicate the Democrats have recruited a new opponent to try and flip this seat back into Democrat hands…. So I have three simple words for the Democrat Machine: BRING. IT. ON. I’m ready for the fight ahead because I know the facts are on my side. I’m incredibly proud of all we have accomplished in just a few short months. From voting to secure the border to fighting for better care for our veterans, I’ve hit the ground running and focused on delivering results. But we’ve seen how this goes…facts don’t matter to the Democrats…they will lie and spread misinformation about me and Republicans…they will call us every name in the book, and sadly the Mainstream Media and Big Tech will have their back…we are going to be up against A LOT. But as a veteran, military spouse, and mom of four, I’ve never encountered a challenge too big, and I’m committed to running hard and WINNING in 2024. The reality is I can’t do it alone, though. I’m counting on the help and support from great Americans like YOU! My opponent will have the support of the Democrat Machine, but my campaign is powered by hard-working Americans just like you. name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27494%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mikMBn2VQ3WxUlLfwAUqjw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27405%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rGkG0nteVwSsHZJnUBB0nA&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27405%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rGkG0nteVwSsHZJnUBB0nA&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Official committee recommends Rudy G be disbarred. Sign and show your support!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand Rudy Giuliani be Disbarred](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a3af74b-b5c9-4acd-aa60-100d468b8b08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta17cd7b7-5ea9-4e2d-b611-9b3bc6edb88c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | An official attorney disciplinary committee [just recommended](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72ffd556-2af7-482a-9c06-7d00bec3b042/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that Rudy Giuliani be disbarred in Washington, DC! There are still [two more official bodies that must](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8f6f3da-a168-4a31-94f8-8489d8ab1b07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) approve this recommendation, but this is a critical first step to making it happen. **[Add your name, show your support, and demand Rudy Giuliani be disbarred and prevented from practicing law ever again >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ef6265a-47aa-4649-9c4f-ce8b61ce7edb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** As Trump's former personal attorney, Rudy Giuliani played a huge role in the attempt to overthrow the 2020 election. He led a scheme to direct illegitimate Republican electors to submit false documents certifying the election for Trump in seven states that Trump lost. And he spread baseless conspiracy theories about nonexistent election fraud for months on end. **We've had enough of Rudy Giuliani and his antics – he can't be let off the hook. He must be held accountable for his lies about the 2020 election! And we must show that there is strong public support for the disciplinary committee's recommendation.** [**Sign the petition: Demand Rudy Giuliani be disbarred >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1cac524-43b3-48f7-bf12-316cd1357954/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63ffa55f-1480-4a84-b027-a09917d53974/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37ec3858-8ac6-44d5-83c5-077f2a50d1c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e8458ac-b313-4c82-a8e8-7e1ea5774673/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9d4b23f-fcb7-4afe-a8ce-99cca85a81d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T352ddd6b-adc3-4f7e-92b7-7cbfd4db460a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f0e7453624c45acb888a35bd84f8a84&_e=QVrbcPaT6QmfktORrdY3p8pYL45hVUWEJ_CiQNFv54-xVYT3uOqJ-J3Vc97E2Rj8n8WsZthBkc4eUDGc4rVzcvlN31aqdO5-IKgHjnoTdiN79ivVBPOfkXVN1zo1OYYrJeVpRwAKR5FKQUCFogUVm0uVL09th_mEjsboZ1n9SmtgSwSCwS8fgwEjvt8GuE-Z_hRoYJpNIP0DwL9GPE9jaZNE6SuUHDnDa7H_rcCvn3Asm8Hy5kYvwkUXbt2vr0RnMN0aV7lLRo1_-DwDdujWW8q5HPrvBmwHn8tAYe9jl0g%3D)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don't prepare now... name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbc07614c0794060941c6be7989b6334&_e=d5l16ytqTXcBsZq1GN0N4CdlDHmppA5CAirF0O_NIou3UKLl6V9M4p-NqFTNNycf-UZLLzHBmoixLNO2lMtApsb0awL6o6stBC2TJPpjIPlvkH1XfzO04zSTWWkX46FUgfmpk9FR_hwXLeobrq1HXxEtGpF3Aky0u56_7qp2gQnqGo4RjTDDHM1v8XG760T5m60D4aRYTACth14nkc9EQPQuu5n6c-cIfLgqOFXbaoOFY85-UMRD4mv6XdheLSZZfOoYc5XjrJc_CXmiY8MMhQJ6YH9vsraq1g5xW-cVQIjZXvoxHpMmNL-uES80lgtuYxyD53082GvKUzeXFL0epTMDHrA5lNBIXnCNL980t6FI-lEaF-Hze4fDz2OChQ3UtTte5VSX10VvpIkBkI-maoQTagsrhx5F_VhTFMkTiSs%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbc07614c0794060941c6be7989b6334&_e=d5l16ytqTXcBsZq1GN0N4CdlDHmppA5CAirF0O_NIou3UKLl6V9M4p-NqFTNNycf-UZLLzHBmoixLNO2lMtApsb0awL6o6stBC2TJPpjIPlvkH1XfzO04zSTWWkX46FUgfmpk9FR_hwXLeobrq1HXxEtGpF3Aky0u56_7qp2gQnqGo4RjTDDHM1v8XG760T5m60D4aRYTACth14nkc9EQPQuu5n6c-cIfLgqOFXbaoOFY85-UMRD4mv6XdheLSZZfEiPFvniOux2td2fh-mk8s-kLbPiv6zqXN5YMoySdssijmoku0Ld8-CvhwgFHFCbgXQo0l7aOP54TRr0VCTf-XGipB3NlkqhrnpmcKxXfwYJ65ZyreEayxzDJG9tGnFeonpXsVBwRGr2dAxGWV_5INIT0nQevHiWgb7b-waJuDg%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbc07614c0794060941c6be7989b6334&_e=d5l16ytqTXcBsZq1GN0N4CdlDHmppA5CAirF0O_NIou3UKLl6V9M4p-NqFTNNycf-UZLLzHBmoixLNO2lMtApsb0awL6o6stBC2TJPpjIPlvkH1XfzO04zSTWWkX46FUgfmpk9FR_hwXLeobrq1HXxEtGpF3Aky0u56_7qp2gQnqGo4RjTDDHM1v8XG760T5m60D4aRYTACth14nkc9EQPQuu5n6c-cIfLgqOFXbaoOFY85-UMRD4mv6XdheLSZZTTEsuDDb4kryMXnhzD-zd0iGG2xiJtTD60rcJvyjn3yAriWX3XNOavD_19n1ACavPoXHjf24g23qk0Wu8yHUBr5vjY4VBrxegyQRktCD22B0QZaMGxX5j1W8H18sXfwqJpN1ATkl5fHX2d5GGE6iYT78Ov-tSp8Iyg9_cICoyHI%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Sean Themea
subject: Here is how Biden’s new gun ban scheme works…
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4479c3b7b37f4c0f994e80d5f5c6b85c&_e=hT8hpfbJQTGhpCXidQZrwvi4Sr_KDBXRnLOKYZoplZhG8gBSMoTr2AevSxg8sxgkhLCNkoRvJBfuOQ1gOrpM7Dl0X0JSVR_yNxWgtbNGfyRE0eBvGt17SAlXJwbYSM7em31ZWeavy7MlULmu4mQbdqRMJN_iZAxJuxRdwBwC3QkRZIGzVOSU7JzwZ_rO6ay8wm4hVxrvzO0WF7PkAIiKKS2futRhZy3j3lmGiymzHbrd_wGddjaZ-8yln1KEzneTgHYhOcGv5Fick9eXPe-JVg%3D%3D)

Hello Friend,

You can always count on the federal government to make a power grab after a tragedy. Biden is, once again, pushing to "BAN the manufacture and sale" of AR rifles and high-capacity magazines.

When the Federal government wants to disarm law-abiding American patriots, we can't afford to remain silent.

This is a direct assault on YOUR Constitutional rights. But don't worry...

**Young Americans for Liberty is on the front lines in the fight for Constitutional rights!**

I am Sean Themea, the Chief Operating Officer at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation's largest, most active, and most effective youth liberty organization on campus and in American electoral politics.

[You can support Young Americans for Liberty's fight for liberty and our Constitutional rights on college campuses and beyond. Click here to donate $100, $50, or even just $10 today >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4479c3b7b37f4c0f994e80d5f5c6b85c&_e=hT8hpfbJQTGhpCXidQZrwvi4Sr_KDBXRnLOKYZoplZhG8gBSMoTr2AevSxg8sxgkhLCNkoRvJBfuOQ1gOrpM7Dl0X0JSVR_yNxWgtbNGfyRE0eBvGt17SAlXJwbYSM7e1pwLnR76YJBDWigRL4Vd6rqP_2fBDEGC7J5m1ERModwCZzURwWIOSfh8gTXlbqB63fpRdwtt92_fRq5NhQWqvedEWbvpJeTxMDXSDqH4uQCRzZUPX0mvk4DztT497XithhhyboIhlZ8C6DTOIUpIQQ%3D%3D)

I'm not sure if anti-gun lawmakers know this or if they just don't care (it's infinitely worse if they don't care), but gun bans leave people vulnerable when tragedy happens.

That hasn't stopped Biden from pushing to disarm Americans -- over the past 30 years, he has made multiple attempts to ban guns.

America needs pro-gun laws because gun bans don't work right now. Anyone telling you otherwise is lying to you.

But YAL is making a difference!

While gun-grabbers try to take away your guns, our student activists and liberty legislators are ensuring our schools aren't soft targets!

**So far, YAL activists and legislators have passed Constitutional Carry in Indiana, Texas, and Alabama. Young Americans for Liberty has also elected more than 250 hardcore, pro-2A legislators across the country.**

I truly believe YAL's student activists can make a proactive difference in the fight for gun rights. That's why I set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the month to fund our efforts. And with your support, we can give them the resources they need to stand up for the Second Amendment.
[Young Americans for Liberty is winning in the fight for YOUR rights. Please send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount to support a student activist today >>_>_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4479c3b7b37f4c0f994e80d5f5c6b85c&_e=hT8hpfbJQTGhpCXidQZrwvi4Sr_KDBXRnLOKYZoplZhG8gBSMoTr2AevSxg8sxgkhLCNkoRvJBfuOQ1gOrpM7Dl0X0JSVR_yNxWgtbNGfyRE0eBvGt17SAlXJwbYSM7e8z6rpyHOmkmUGGDVm-uDTw0I0ilgqC5tYZH9AEhiF1Qp-gs198ouXBMTkwUgJp02iqkzqhVt70MCEjd71OKmSfnR3W3ukGg31xP7DCzisiqkseunYXXl5YEYQJju-qqHm2TBjORLjaOJyiYO5ril0A%3D%3D)

I don't believe the Founding Fathers were unclear when they said,
_**"The right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed. "**_
Even a "well-regulated" in the Second Amendment never meant regulated by the government. But if we aren't careful, the federal government will finally rob us of our rights. And once they are gone, they are much more difficult to get back.

clean_body: Hello Friend, You can always count on the federal government to make a power grab after a tragedy. Biden is, once again, pushing to "BAN the manufacture and sale" of AR rifles and high-capacity magazines. When the Federal government wants to disarm law-abiding American patriots, we can't afford to remain silent. This is a direct assault on YOUR Constitutional rights. But don't worry... Young Americans for Liberty is on the front lines in the fight for Constitutional rights! I am Sean Themea, the Chief Operating Officer at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation's largest, most active, and most effective youth liberty organization on campus and in American electoral politics. I'm not sure if anti-gun lawmakers know this or if they just don't care (it's infinitely worse if they don't care), but gun bans leave people vulnerable when tragedy happens. That hasn't stopped Biden from pushing to disarm Americans -- over the past 30 years, he has made multiple attempts to ban guns. America needs pro-gun laws because gun bans don't work right now. Anyone telling you otherwise is lying to you. But YAL is making a difference! While gun-grabbers try to take away your guns, our student activists and liberty legislators are ensuring our schools aren't soft targets! So far, YAL activists and legislators have passed Constitutional Carry in Indiana, Texas, and Alabama. Young Americans for Liberty has also elected more than 250 hardcore, pro-2A legislators across the country. I truly believe YAL's student activists can make a proactive difference in the fight for gun rights. That's why I set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the month to fund our efforts. And with your support, we can give them the resources they need to stand up for the Second Amendment. I don't believe the Founding Fathers were unclear when they said, "The right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed. " Even a "well-regulated" in the Second Amendment never meant regulated by the government. But if we aren't careful, the federal government will finally rob us of our rights. And once they are gone, they are much more difficult to get back. Please help us meet our $50,000 goal before the end of the month. Just chip in any amount by clicking below. Thank you for your support. I look forward to having you with us. For Liberty, Sean Themea Chief Operating Officer Young Americans for Liberty Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Orphaned wolves are starving to death
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Vulnerable wolves are being hunted in droves. Donate $27 now to help us reach our $2,920 goal by midnight tonight!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867240?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867241?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Tiny paws wander across the forest floor. Eager pups get their first look at summer. These innocent wolves don’t notice the steel traps set by trophy hunters lurking in the trees. They don’t have time to react as the metal rips into their paws, painting the forest floor red. **Their lives have barely begun, and now they’re in a struggle to survive.** [**No innocent creature should endure this: Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $2,920 goal by midnight tonight to help protect vulnerable wolves and the planet.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867242?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
This scene is common in Northern Rockies states that border Yellowstone. There are _no safeguards_ to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters. They’re killing off innocent and vulnerable wolves in droves -- and using the most inhumane of hunting practices.
The situation is dire, Friend, but there’s still hope for vulnerable wolves. Thanks to members like you, we can still make real change happen and protect wolves before it’s too late. But trophy hunters are doubling down against protections for these precious animals. _We need to act now to give them a fighting chance._
**These vicious hunting practices can’t continue. Help us protect wolves and the planet: Rush your $27 donation now!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867240?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867241?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Wolves had begun to make a slow but promising recovery over the past six decades. Last year, three baby wolf pups were born to the only wolf pack left in Colorado. **The pups were suspected to be the first wolves born in Colorado in 80 years.**
Protected by the state, they were a symbol of hope for repopulation efforts. But wolves aren’t bound by state lines -- the second they set their tiny paws onto Wyoming soil, they become _**vulnerable to the most brutal hunting practices we’ve seen.**_
Sure enough, three mangled, bloody young wolf carcasses were found across Wyoming state lines.
Not even wolves in Yellowstone are safe from the pattern. **The park recently lost a record high of 25 wolves, leaving only 89 behind.** _Yet the states that border Yellowstone still have limited safeguards_ to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters and their inhumane practices!
In states like Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming, wolves are **dynamited in their dens** while nursing their pups. Baby wolves are left **bleeding out in steel traps and slowly choking to death on snares** in a futile attempt to escape. Trophy hunters unleash bloodhounds on them,_**tearing their flesh apart while they yelp for help that won’t come.**_ Will you join us and help answer their cries for aid?
**Help protect vulnerable wolves from brutal hunters and Big Polluters before it’s too late. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $2,920 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867240?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867241?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in? They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
Yet, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are pushing against protections for these precious creatures, hoping to kill them for sport and invade their habitats for the sake of corporate greed. Their actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species -- and now, only **6,000 wolves remain in the lower 48 states.**
And for trophy hunters, it’s not enough to just take the lives of innocent wolves -- they resort to helicopter chases and torturous snares that fill a wolf’s last hours with _**panic, dread, and insurmountable pain.**_ To make matters worse, wolf pups are left orphaned after their mothers are gunned down in the woods. Without their mothers, wolf pups can suffer from _**hypothermia, starvation, and predation.**_
Friends of the Earth is fighting back and working to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs and protect our planet. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. The ESA allows us to shield endangered species from senseless violence and also block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. Friend, your membership gift today can help save wolves from vicious attacks on the ESA and protect the future of our planet.
But we are facing pushback from private trophy-hunting interests, and we need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. If just 1 of every 10 people reading this contribute, we can reach our $2,920 goal -- will you rush your $27 donation now?
**Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our $2,920 goal.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867240?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867241?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth **

To make matters worse, wolf pups are left orphaned after their mothers are gunned down in the woods. Without their mothers, wolf pups can suffer from hypothermia, starvation, and predation. Friends of the Earth is fighting back and working to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs and protect our planet. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. The ESA allows us to shield endangered species from senseless violence and also block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. Friend, your membership gift today can help save wolves from vicious attacks on the ESA and protect the future of our planet. But we are facing pushback from private trophy-hunting interests, and we need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. If just 1 of every 10 people reading this contribute, we can reach our $2,920 goal -- will you rush your $27 donation now? Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our $2,920 goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Raena Garcia Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

| | | We're facing a dire threat to reproductive freedom, and we need your immediate support. It's an outrageous attempt to control our bodies and deny us the autonomy we deserve. [**We need 5,000 people to join us before midnight in an effort to fight back. Will you join us? If this national abortion ban becomes a reality, its impact will be devastating, particularly for marginalized communities. It will force individuals to endure unwanted pregnancies, endanger their health, and restrict their economic opportunities. [But we refuse to back down. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb94003a3-d285-462f-8e43-0bea7bbdbf8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: A bad decision 13 years ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Let's fix it, together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Thirteen years ago, the Supreme Court made a decision that forever changed the landscape of our political system.
By declaring corporations as "people" under the First Amendment, Citizens United opened the floodgates for a wave of corporate influence in our elections.
What was intended to protect free speech has inadvertently allowed politicians to prioritize corporate donors over the needs and aspirations of the American people.
Citizens United is an affront to democracy. It has created a system where politicians are often more concerned with appeasing powerful corporate interests than representing the voices of ordinary citizens. It is time for us to take a stand and restore democracy to its rightful place.
As a candidate for Congress, I am committed to fighting for campaign finance reform. I will work tirelessly to ensure that our electoral system is not hijacked by special interests, and that the power to shape our nation's future remains in the hands of the people.
But I cannot do it alone – I need your support.
- By contributing to my campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , you can also help me advocate for judicial reform, where we will advocate for an ethical code of conduct that prioritizes the protection of our democratic values. We need a judiciary that upholds the principles of fairness, justice, and equality, rather than one that caters to the whims of the highest bidder.
Together, we can establish a system where the power lies with the people; a system where every voice is heard, regardless of wealth or influence. Your donation, no matter the size, will play a crucial role in fueling this movement for change.
When we're people-powered, every dollar counts, and I am grateful for any support you can provide.
Thank you for joining me in this fight. Together, we can reclaim our democracy and build a brighter future for all.
Have a great weekend,
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for Congress
Democrat, MI01
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]

clean_body: [] Let's fix it, together. [] [] Friend, Thirteen years ago, the Supreme Court made a decision that forever changed the landscape of our political system. By declaring corporations as "people" under the First Amendment, Citizens United opened the floodgates for a wave of corporate influence in our elections. What was intended to protect free speech has inadvertently allowed politicians to prioritize corporate donors over the needs and aspirations of the American people. Citizens United is an affront to democracy. It has created a system where politicians are often more concerned with appeasing powerful corporate interests than representing the voices of ordinary citizens. It is time for us to take a stand and restore democracy to its rightful place. As a candidate for Congress, I am committed to fighting for campaign finance reform. I will work tirelessly to ensure that our electoral system is not hijacked by special interests, and that the power to shape our nation's future remains in the hands of the people. But I cannot do it alone – I need your support. - By contributing to my campaign [] , you can also help me advocate for judicial reform, where we will advocate for an ethical code of conduct that prioritizes the protection of our democratic values. We need a judiciary that upholds the principles of fairness, justice, and equality, rather than one that caters to the whims of the highest bidder. Together, we can establish a system where the power lies with the people; a system where every voice is heard, regardless of wealth or influence. Your donation, no matter the size, will play a crucial role in fueling this movement for change. When we're people-powered, every dollar counts, and I am grateful for any support you can provide. Thank you for joining me in this fight. Together, we can reclaim our democracy and build a brighter future for all. Have a great weekend, Bob Lorinser Candidate for Congress Democrat, MI01 [] if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately. CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] MORE [] Or send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

subject: BIG NEWS: First Amendment victory yesterday
body:
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaaf7abfb5db4b42b8989e2953bf276a&_e=J3YQI-9UBH338-gl_T8CS2iWyRxcWgOZYJ2YwBHohfP6-bD-lHVynYl6LBzzGrw9I6t2et1wrAsIz2i23CpsI9Q-LAMzqwyj30mvYZ-TL2YQI5jPy3559nX4SFr7l8o-RAgNv9eojmhCGYp2jVS3e0V3dy8nO76S8mxLkXztp2BWiAX_DdglclnQ40sGKdWgAVoUrHHmmwlqTgO-9aoPYuf42Orw1Kv7F_XGAtCFx2YV61bRBDlLiizFwQrxGT45eNIM7NJnsXA7hQSy8drB4A%3D%3D)

Hello Friend,

Media Research Center (MRC) won a huge victory for free speech this Independence Day!

A federal judge in Louisiana ruled the collusion between the Biden administration and Big Tech unconstitutional. Now, parts of the government, **including the FBI** , can no longer talk to social media companies for _" the purpose of urging, encouraging, pressuring, or inducing in any manner the removal, deletion, suppression, or reduction of content containing protected free speech."_

**This is a major victory for conservatives who have had their content censored on social media and our First Amendment rights.**

The plaintiffs in this court case used MRC's CensorTrack project to prove that Big Tech companies were targeting conservative content on the orders of the government.

Our CensorTrack project documents censorship on conservative content in real time while our news team exposes Big Tech's efforts to the public.

I set a goal to raise $20,000 this week to continue our fight against conservative censorship. Will you support MRC and help us win more victories for free speech?

[You can help us celebrate this victory for our rights by donating $17.76 today. Your support empowers our CensorTrack project to expose conservative censorship in the media. Click here to give. >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaaf7abfb5db4b42b8989e2953bf276a&_e=J3YQI-9UBH338-gl_T8CS2iWyRxcWgOZYJ2YwBHohfP6-bD-lHVynYl6LBzzGrw9I6t2et1wrAsIz2i23CpsI9Q-LAMzqwyj30mvYZ-TL2ac8TydCx0sZ02D4FJ-2inljor7UU4oKKcxvy2X7xhJW_OQ2TZ2CXlv2sc90VOljdAXZxi5EgAxgMTXWeLSKBawzg07NCoUfj66y69y9CUxb-R_ck40iDBIOSBM4zBDGjLb0GjXQC8C4FRejhMWYkU2if2WOfpxQJle1V-Z2Uws_GbZ6QOAzulw5CWalt1lUqs%3D)

We had documentation proving that Facebook and YouTube coordinated with multiple government agencies to censor posts about COVID-19 and other topics.

Including White House Officials:
* Meta _(Facebook and Instagram)_ identified 32 additional federal officials who communicated with them.
* YouTube identified 11 federal officials who communicated with them.

**This isn 't the first time MRC's CensorTrack database played a critical part in exposing the collusion between the federal government and Big Tech to silence conservatives.**

Between March 10, 2020, and March 10, 2022, **we recorded 646 cases of anti-conservative censorship** in our CensorTrack database!

We've had _over 5,500 entries into Censortrack_ since we started doing it in 2020.

And unless we continue to expose their collusion, you can be sure there are more...

name: Elizabeth Warren HQ
subject: Why Elizabeth Warren is running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We can pass a wealth tax, make child care affordable, make the Supreme Court follow a basic code of ethics, and much, much more. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162668/415541745/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15F_EGR_Q_20230708_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmQ1ODg5My1hNjFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDLfytgG8BA-sZvQpG8Z1SfBzOw23G2hkHIjx8Fmy9I=&emci=34d58893-a61d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=36d58893-a61d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
When people tell Elizabeth Warren that something just isn't possible, she proves them wrong. When Elizabeth started working to create a consumer agency, people said she would never get it past the big banks and their allies in Congress. But she took them on, and she beat them. When, in her first campaign for Senate, she started 17 points down against a popular incumbent Republican, people told her she was going to lose. She took him on, and she beat him. And shortly after she released one of her first plans during her presidential campaign — to crack down on wealthy corporations that weren't paying any federal income taxes — critics said that it was pie-in-the-sky. But she kept pushing for it, defied the naysayers, defeated corporate lobbyists, and passed a new tax on massive corporate profits. When we ignore the critics, aren’t afraid to take on the righteous fights, and invest in the change we truly believe in, we win. There’s much more progress to make together, and that’s why Elizabeth is running for re-election — and why we’re asking for your support: [_**Elizabeth can’t do this important work without a strong grassroots movement by her side. If you’re able to, can you please chip in $20 or anything you can to power Elizabeth’s re-election campaign so she can keep fighting in the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162669/415541746/-1332346508?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15F_EGR_Q_20230708_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmQ1ODg5My1hNjFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDLfytgG8BA-sZvQpG8Z1SfBzOw23G2hkHIjx8Fmy9I=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_
