clean_body: We can pass a wealth tax, make child care affordable, make the Supreme Court follow a basic code of ethics, and much, much more. | | | When people tell Elizabeth Warren that something just isn't possible, she proves them wrong. When Elizabeth started working to create a consumer agency, people said she would never get it past the big banks and their allies in Congress. But she took them on, and she beat them. When, in her first campaign for Senate, she started 17 points down against a popular incumbent Republican, people told her she was going to lose. She took him on, and she beat him. And shortly after she released one of her first plans during her presidential campaign — to crack down on wealthy corporations that weren't paying any federal income taxes — critics said that it was pie-in-the-sky. But she kept pushing for it, defied the naysayers, defeated corporate lobbyists, and passed a new tax on massive corporate profits. When we ignore the critics, aren’t afraid to take on the righteous fights, and invest in the change we truly believe in, we win. There’s much more progress to make together, and that’s why Elizabeth is running for re-election — and why we’re asking for your support: = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Elizabeth is advocating for big, structural change because that's what working families need. And she knows that Democrats win when we unapologetically fight for bold reforms — not just nibble around the edges. To make real change, you have to call out what's broken. You have to propose a plan to fix it. And you have to fight — with leaders on the inside and a grassroots movement on the outside. That's how Elizabeth has defied the odds to deliver results. And that's why we need to keep strengthening our movement: so that we can pass a wealth tax, make child care affordable, make the Supreme Court follow a basic code of ethics, and much, much more. = Thanks for being a part of this, Team Warren = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX78aMG_OMYOlHazfU2IPRk2LrXz_Tt-T57kqliLqclUQIWlOvYmMpjV8tZ4hTRg93Q7h3ZyyvgCSnMIIWB2K_xVNiwBp2_9-ufKxYdk1-qJxTg9N7i59CO822tXozk-WVPV7fsqMtG2MIWP9pCzCYE4%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX-VnJ6CfClcAYBYYdnaOiBvis1Uv6-CDHpAxFVU3-iKC6eeo6Ti_dlOCJn5TEHuj08S8u8qrvt614lK1fvuPzV0w9X5-Ak0j_e8ZupZHbjrKbnVjXHwxXqaGADa-5V8UbogD1WmkU9CSxsr-SnY5ZQU%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX_Auc8hngTjuBasVTHIEo1kGLaiMzzxi9jz6DzIDDj2SwlLZUG6LJ1yuBTJGOxrS-2yZMWzCCQo1-KKBqA50yGfCTgOPZzx4sSIEd4rIdLGyZgwj1Ys-zAQyXqdcMYz7rgQbNlHzwbq3G0venhSGE68%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX-JZssoShX5IdBLam8JgNs69dqPnJK9DodcW4YWtWcwKF2uPeUxF6lNUiTJ2js0bUZPFZmTSs3RAH6-2Qg3h9ox4iybAe6_UxurkGDQ3KTrtDmfyKOV9xi9r2ZoS6Hz5aFjEaX9D4IbXxdKnL446qJQ%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX0riByPSnle1LLAdPsiRxwgMb0ZB4-4D5ldh1R2cnwG4towIFn3QXr1El6uR4Rm6j6DeqFll7TK313FwBL0s3cQ92uBKup5JQWVYuq5jmFc36jdGyzpPqfOvGqeFskt3E5gCuQwyFbITt-_zvUWxvd0%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX56X46jfG5liBqB1RSxGBO7UTdAETR7Xdcvz0_cJ_-VIVSgsMLu4VL3zRX1S_tZDoV_ac1LtKQpRkwxdjzzqnOkWe7mnCapIhwQcMfpizWCAxZzPk-8yRWyWVlnGB9NhI3WjE_QYGoEI6fZokt0VGY0%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40228049b9ad4e6f99e0ca6f78cec4c1&_e=AH_pZzUmgMjf_Fm8Xz4ZTHWQHLDzd9DHoLszTkSaa00VLcL9Mn-UyDU2MJ1MxQcYBDvj67n5Qrx2Jv-ZkD3hOwxyrzvNH3L4W9EPFiLa7sN3UABIxDipaOa7FnuiIYcXmbRAMoES7zpqNvrIIktmX_tDZnF6PbUWoditBpoRbpJlzGw2-vLNeoYK5EJLYz5HP9U_mxckSYQJkb6wf5ZrLMAaTSSdb-qPfR5MTYvKnRAZs0U27IBgNBPE4my81pgBMnGgR6YJc5SG6L8v1TaZ9sVoGKxyn-Yr5CMoEA6Egcg%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Friend,
I have to say - I'm disappointed.
This month, our nation witnessed the single worst encroachment by the federal government in American history.
The Biden Department of Justice tried to _**JAIL**_ its leading opponent - _me_ - as an innocent man.
I had hoped that Republicans _everywhere_ would've said it was time to come together as one big, united front to stand against an out-of-control Deep State that MUST be stopped.
But instead, disloyal Republicans devised a **$300 MILLION PLOT** to try and stop us and replace me with a nominee who will make nice with the Deep State.
**Our nation is on the brink of tyranny. We need a man of courage in charge of our country, not a coward who would drop to his knees and surrender to his captor.**
But I know that _you_ have just as much courage as I do, Friend.
You've stood by our campaign through thick and thin, and made our movement stronger than EVER before.
_And in just a few days, we have the chance to show just how strong we are._
On the June 30 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline, we will prove that not even a sham indictment, an arrest, or even a $300 MILLION PLOT can hurt us.
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to our Primary Victory Fund before the end-of-quarter deadline to counter the $300 MILLION PLOT to stop us in the primary - for 1,500% impact.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ca773f0ddb1246f3af6b96adfadf3fbc&_e=DfvLasoC3pF65dayPJnyGVZu-MzKwpTcQ3cPXLZUUcCUCBngdh4VKsA5wNxRenJCvYNnS0KpmZAW15xeJbYdHvewfWXnIZJ3PbMwdUAULctjh_0oJluPRtizDmgneGoIwhnmLeL7i81lXovOdscq3CoYr1yk3YIPBHCwZr2cSzU5PLyfsrxS3IfjsD8Is9_fvYZy7fqT5W72NliDUbb8IthP8NtluFn3ZK_Y-aabJtTBGWV0s95Gt-4aHwtcdZONsiMYGmvdPMEj_hJLIZIcnfvv_k7PpRuM_tzMUQ776JLFBs6wA8qYUuWMdK5HLIRPU38Q3S2utDxhYHEWEKONZlbQOz2LqQdxv3kuRkZYnrZRrJGVMGQ04XCKTBLDDtrkhHtQbQ5NUnoRgs1-ezIKbw%3D%3D)
Thank you,

### Despite Governor Ron DeSantis's claims that he is fighting the culture war, the state of Florida under his leadership is financially supporting WOKE economic causes and discriminatory DEI programs.
| | [Laura Loomer](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4869703d-b7ca-4242-afec-f36941cf0ab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has cemented his national profile by falsely claiming that "Florida is where [woke goes to die](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4e1160dd-cb2c-4d7f-a9fa-814c0e3d06c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)". However, the state of Florida appears very financially connected to woke financial programs. The [Florida Black Business Loan Program](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/da8818af-bd33-4e1a-b3e0-7d54d4f9e3b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claims to offer alternative lending solutions to "Florida-based, black owned small businesses" by providing short-term loans and technical assistance.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/01006515-77f5-4756-b3e0-dfaa2ff94546?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The publicly stated mission of helping minority owned businesses launch and succeed has come at a heavy cost to tax payers. According to records, Mortlake Nembhard defaulted on a 2009 loan provided by the Florida Black Business Loan Program, leaving taxpayers to shoulder the majority of the $250,000 debt. Interestingly, Nembhard was the chairman of Florida Black Business Investment Board, originally appointed by Governor Jeb Bush.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/228a41ab-669e-4509-8564-f7e44f8b91dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d9fbb2cc-a4d2-4a74-8038-7294e56655fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The program is well hidden in Florida, and is shrouded in secrecy. Control of the state funded program was transferred to a new state agency in 2011, however tens of millions of dollars of pre 2007 loans are [shielded from the view](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a7585ac5-6e77-4c1d-83ba-8f0dd15a85d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of state examiners. It is impossible to know how much, if any, funds were misappropriated during this time.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8l3VoqNc5VmUEWg5jHqsiVYZ6yOgf0jPC0wnThxXS8Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=133810216)
Throughout his time as Governor, Ron DeSantis has repeatedly proclaimed on the 2024 Presidential campaign trail that Florida is where "woke goes to die", and he is often touting his anti- CRT and anti-DEI talking points. DeSantis has also stated that if elected President, he would [eliminate the Department of Commerce](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c5fec7e6-8b82-49b5-ad6b-6bb79a97d845?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) among other agencies. These words and his bloviation regarding his self proclaimed anti-WOKE policy proposals are a glaring contrast to the $2.25 million dollar budget he recently signed for the Florida Black Business Loan Program for Florida's 2023-2024 Fiscal Year.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6ab47ee8-8865-414f-862d-e6b2621682b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to the [Florida Legislature's website](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5da1a793-1e8c-4798-ac8e-91bfbab47ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), under Chapter 288.710, "Black Business Loan Program",
> "The Black Business Loan Program is established in the department, which shall annually certify eligible recipients and subsequently disburse funds appropriated by the Legislature, through such eligible recipients, to black business enterprises that cannot obtain capital through conventional lending institutions but that could otherwise compete successfully in the private sector."
Despite signing off on a budget that includes funding for Florida's woke Black Business Loan Program, Ron DeSantis recently called critical race theory "_pernicious_ " ideology. He also went as far as to [sign legislation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/34c0b791-1ea5-436a-bd9e-c0fffc0b8cf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that bars the notion that discrimination is acceptable to achieve diversity in both businesses and schools. While DeSantis openly and publicly claims that he [opposes critical race](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a5eaa07a-3490-49ae-a3b9-8934aca2df16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) theory in the private sector, and has expressed his support for teachers to be able to sue their private employers for teaching critical race theory, it appears that his own state government under his administration as Governor is funding the very thing he claims to stand against.
Although Ron DeSantis has publicly [committed](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/44188412-27dd-4ba1-8a9f-a2be4454400c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to eliminating Diversity, Equity and Inclusion programs in education, he has remained silent around DEI programs involving finance in Florida. DeSantis routinely talks about merit on the campaign trail regarding education, but the continued funding of Florida's Black Business Loan program proves that he doesn't have the same regard for merit when it comes to entrepreneurship and business ownership.
While the Black Business Loan program was not created under the DeSantis administration, it has certainly expanded under DeSantis. A 2022 grant from The Truist Foundation injected [$200 million dollars](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2dd2cdf5-dce1-4045-80df-ead29f878c3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into the program. Oddly, Truist minority owner Blackrock is also a minority owner of Walt Disney, another "woke company" that Ron DeSantis has publicly gone to war with in his effort to nationalize his culture warrior and anti-Woke facade on the campaign trail.
In another act of hypocrisy, Ron DeSantis has [publicly expressed outrage](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/59b35164-77df-4311-a47b-46479b96e727?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against Blackrock over its stance on ESG and D.E.I. However, the existence of this little known state operated and taxpayer funded organization appears to be another instance of the DeSantis administration and the DeSantis for President campaign having [very different public and private faces.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d27a1449-2142-4bc7-b95c-916a04c1aa39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8l3VoqNc5VmUEWg5jHqsiVYZ6yOgf0jPC0wnThxXS8Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=133810216)
The loan program, which is administered through Florida's [Department of Economic Opportunity](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cb420814-517f-45a4-b6f6-ab6e0fd2d911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) also appears to be full of inefficiencies as well, as there are only two financial institutions in the state currently able to administer the program, including The [Florida A&M University Credit Union](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/65f6764f-6591-4215-9fbe-d331d4d0f05a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the [Miami Bayside Foundation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5bae50b5-bb95-426d-b4fd-c153dd99ce67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/437d3725-88fe-4621-8d18-d7e6afa961aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Although roughly 20% of the program's annual budget is spent on marketing, [it is widely unknown outside of South Florida. ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ba43e1a7-c4d6-48dd-90a4-88a392758414?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) And while Ron DeSantis [recently signed legislation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7e8e1980-7558-43d4-abb1-697bb17a55cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that bans any college or University in Florida from spending its cash on programs related to DEI, he obviously doesn't hold his state's Government to the same standard.
This is just another example of Ron DeSantis and his Administration flip flopping on publicly stated policy positions, so long as millions of dollars are involved...
Or is this even more sinister than standard political hypocrisy and double speak?
Florida voters and taxpayers would like to know, what, if anything, does Governor DeSantis *actually* believe in?

Despite signing off on a budget that includes funding for Florida's woke Black Business Loan Program, Ron DeSantis recently called critical race theory "pernicious " ideology. He also went as far as to that bars the notion that discrimination is acceptable to achieve diversity in both businesses and schools. While DeSantis openly and publicly claims that he theory in the private sector, and has expressed his support for teachers to be able to sue their private employers for teaching critical race theory, it appears that his own state government under his administration as Governor is funding the very thing he claims to stand against. Although Ron DeSantis has publicly to eliminating Diversity, Equity and Inclusion programs in education, he has remained silent around DEI programs involving finance in Florida. DeSantis routinely talks about merit on the campaign trail regarding education, but the continued funding of Florida's Black Business Loan program proves that he doesn't have the same regard for merit when it comes to entrepreneurship and business ownership. While the Black Business Loan program was not created under the DeSantis administration, it has certainly expanded under DeSantis. A 2022 grant from The Truist Foundation injected into the program. Oddly, Truist minority owner Blackrock is also a minority owner of Walt Disney, another "woke company" that Ron DeSantis has publicly gone to war with in his effort to nationalize his culture warrior and anti-Woke facade on the campaign trail. In another act of hypocrisy, Ron DeSantis has against Blackrock over its stance on ESG and D.E.I. However, the existence of this little known state operated and taxpayer funded organization appears to be another instance of the DeSantis administration and the DeSantis for President campaign having The loan program, which is administered through Florida's also appears to be full of inefficiencies as well, as there are only two financial institutions in the state currently able to administer the program, including The and the . | | ---|---|--- Although roughly 20% of the program's annual budget is spent on marketing, And while Ron DeSantis that bans any college or University in Florida from spending its cash on programs related to DEI, he obviously doesn't hold his state's Government to the same standard. This is just another example of Ron DeSantis and his Administration flip flopping on publicly stated policy positions, so long as millions of dollars are involved... Or is this even more sinister than standard political hypocrisy and double speak? Florida voters and taxpayers would like to know, what, if anything, does Governor DeSantis actually believe in? subject: Upholding the Power of Local Governments & Protecting Your Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
Championing the 10th Amendment for Ohio's Future | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/059b7cea18c6/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6137689?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=1ee0122855&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | The principles of federalism are at the very heart of our nation's constitution, which seeks to strike a balance between local, state, and federal government powers. This is not just a question of how your taxpayer dollars are spent, but also who ultimately gets to govern your life.

In the vast majority of cases, I believe in the power of the 10th Amendment: _“The powers not delegated to the United States by the Constitution, nor prohibited by it to the States, are reserved to the States respectively, or to the people”._ This foundational principle is more important now than ever before, as we seek to address the unique needs of our constituents here in Ohio.
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=a677817336&e=d6699466fe)
---
| I steadfastly maintain that local and state governments should have the prerogative to make decisions that directly affect their citizens. It's easier to knock on your mayor's door than the President's. This belief embodies the heart of localism and decentralization - principles that I will champion when elected to Congress.

I am committed to protecting our Constitutional rights and my focus is on reinvigorating the rightful power of local and state authorities. Ohio's communities deserve to have their voices heard and their needs catered to, without unnecessary federal interference.

Peter, your support is crucial in my efforts to promote this principle of localized governance in Congress. Every dollar contributed to my campaign represents our collective fight to respect and bolster the power of local authorities, and in doing so, protect the rights and liberties of our citizens.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why do folks go “woke”? Update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570875?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Why do many of America’s long-established institutions suddenly “go woke”? **

For decades, highly respected universities were solid bastions of academic excellence, producing well-rounded citizens. Then suddenly, wham! They’re embroiled in a row about white privilege and the need to make reparations for the past.

**What we once called “political correctness” has been a thing on certain progressive university campuses since the 1980s. But until relatively recently, extreme ideas more or less stayed there.** Now it feels as if these radical ideas are starting to move mainstream.
---
|
---
_What makes a company selling a product to Americans claim that America “exists on stolen land”?_

| **Last week, as millions of American’s celebrated July 4 th, Ben & Jerry’s ice cream (owned by the international corporation, Unilever) put out a tweet claiming that the United States “exists on stolen land”, which should be “returned”. **

Not long before that, one of Bud Light’s marketing executives talked about the need to distance the brand from “frat guys”, and embrace “inclusivity”. **Their campaign certainly seems to have cost them the “frat guys”, without perhaps including as many new transgender customers. Reports suggest they lost about a third of their sales. **
---
|
---
_Frat boys not included?_
| Not long before that there was Disney, a leading family entertainment business in America, which decided to take a radical stance on social issues in Florida that many families might object to.

**What possesses these businesses to suddenly embrace an ideological stance almost designed to offend millions of potential customers? **Initially, I assumed that it was all part of a cunning marketing plan. Now I wonder if it is arrogance coupled with a blind adherence to ideology.

To understand why some people go woke, perhaps we should try to understand something about the nature of the “woke” belief system in the first place.

**Those that are “woke” are called “woke” because they see themselves as having woken up to the way that the world actually works** – hence the name. According to their self-image, they have a heightened awareness of social injustice. So much so, in fact, that they have an understanding of the world around them that others do not have.

**A defining characteristic of being “woke” is to have a sense of moral superiority over those that are unwoke. **It is this sense of moral superiority, I believe, rather than any carefully thought-through marketing campaign, which explains why some marketing executives run such gratuitous campaigns.

**“Woke” ideology is really a belief system, rather like a religion. Indeed, for many of its adherents, “woke” ideology has become a kind of post-religious religion. **

**“****When a man stops believing in God” wrote GK Chesterton, “he doesn’t then believe in nothing, he believes anything."** For the past half century, there has been a decline in traditional religious observance throughout the Western world. **The cult of woke has come along as the belief system for those who no longer believe. **

**“Woke” ideas give people a way of making sense of the world** \- however absurd it might seem to the rest of us. “Woke” ideology places everyone into a hierarchy of victimhood. Those with certain immutable characteristics are deemed “oppressors”, and those with others are deemed the “oppressed”. It is your so-called “intersectional identity” that determines where you sit in the hierarchy of victimhood – and fundamentally, your moral worth.

**Once you see the world this way, politics ceases to be a matter of personal preference or opinion. **Instead, it becomes an all-consuming passion, and a struggle between absolute right Vs absolute wrong.

**Marketing ceases to be a matter of trying to maximise sales and revenue.** It becomes a chance to demonstrate your absolute righteousness, even at the expense of telling your customers they are bad and millions of Americans that their country is illegitimate.

**Saddest of all, those that join the cult of woke all too often stop seeing friends and family as an assortment of people, with mixed tastes and opinions, bound by ties of love. Instead, those that do not share the cult of inclusivity and tolerance must not be cut off and not tolerated.

If the “woke” creed resembles a religion, it is one that does not seem to offer much hope of redemption. It cancels those that fall short. **

According to the cult of woke, socioeconomic outcomes in America are not explained by differences in individual aptitude or behavior. They are explained by the unfairness of “the system”, which the “woke” believe is inherently immoral and wrong.

Once you start to see the world in the “woke” way, you don’t just start to believe that America is always in the wrong. Like every bloody revolutionary from the Jacobins to the Leninists, you start to believe that you need to tear down what exists and start again.

**“Woke” ideas are not merely an annoyance, or an irritation. They are a profoundly malevolent belief system that unless tackled risk tearing the American Republic apart.**

**It is encouraging that we are starting to see consumer boycotts against “woke” corporations, but we need to see much more of it.** I have been impressed with _Vivek Ramaswamy’s campaign against_ “woke” investment managers on Wall Street. This could be start of something big.

**Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we run a Leadership Academy designed as an antidote to “woke” ideology.** We introduce young Mississippians to the idea that the free market and America are a force for moral good. We teach classes on why the United States is a profoundly moral achievement, and why Americans should take pride in their country and its (imperfect) past.

**If we are to develop an effective antidote to the “woke” delusion, perhaps we must also recognize that human beings need to believe in something bigger and better than themselves. If we do not offer them a good and true belief system, they will latch on to one that is malevolent and false.**

Have a wonderful (non-woke) weekend!
---

For decades, highly respected universities were solid bastions of academic excellence, producing well-rounded citizens. Then suddenly, wham! What we once called “political correctness” has been a thing on certain progressive university campuses since the 1980s. But until relatively recently, extreme ideas more or less stayed there. name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand Texas Republicans End Their Attacks on Clean Energy
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand Texas Republicans End Their Attacks on Clean Energy](https://default.salsalabs.org/T026e219a-ff47-475b-9cc4-11dc10f7ed8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b3395e8-db34-40c5-9cba-48fe1cfa11e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Texas is in the middle of a[ clean energy boom](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1470c48e-f05f-4bbf-bd0b-d02c44c1ad9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**, which is fantastic news for the state's environment and economy. The Lone Star State is already the number one producer of wind power in the country, and solar power in Texas is rapidly expanding, too. **But Texas Republicans are trying to kill it.** They have introduced a number of bills to the Texas legislature to make it more difficult to produce wind and solar energy, and give an unfair advantage to fossil fuels. It's unfair, it's incredibly stupid, it's hypocritical (for people who claim to favor competition), and it will hurt all of us by accelerating climate change. [**Add your name, and demand that Texas Republicans stop trying to kill the clean energy boom.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3177fee2-6d38-4695-868e-6edfd52e10f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

body:
Think about everything at stake in this election
#

Peter -
Think about everything at stake in this election: expanding voting rights, protecting abortion access, and on the other extreme, keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate.
We can win this race, but we need to get on track after the holiday to hit our July goal. [**So please, chip in $3 today to help us flip this Senate seat from Senator Sinema to Ruben Gallego.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230708-1&t=1&akid=794%2E734936%2EpD7Haj)

name: Kash Patel
subject: This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930797:JZ362oINS:m:1:3299561967:61E19A63D45E468D0125CCCB90EB8A0C:r)

Patriot,

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930797:JZ362oINS:m:1:3299561967:61E19A63D45E468D0125CCCB90EB8A0C:r)
You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information.

**I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse.** My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots.

**_Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions_.**

[Can you donate any amount you can afford to help Kash Foundation serve government whistleblowers? Click here to donate >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930797:JZ362oINS:m:1:3299561967:61E19A63D45E468D0125CCCB90EB8A0C:r)

[Donate](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930797:JZ362oINS:m:1:3299561967:61E19A63D45E468D0125CCCB90EB8A0C:r)

Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangsters corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments.

If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption.

If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees.

Without whistleblowers:
* We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message.

* We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI.

* We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes.

Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us, or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up and I hope you can join me.

[Please donate today to the Kash Foundation to help me raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours. Your support will help a whistleblower come forward to expose the corruption. Please select any amount below to donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930797:JZ362oINS:m:1:3299561967:61E19A63D45E468D0125CCCB90EB8A0C:r)

Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid. You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist. None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information. I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse. My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots. Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions. Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangsters corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments. If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption. If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees. Without whistleblowers: We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message. We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI. * We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes. Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us, or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up and I hope you can join me. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Representative Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct. I know what it's like to be targeted by government gangsters. I know how to fight back because I've successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax. Now, I am counting on your help to expose the corrupt two-tiered system of justice. Thank you, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. name: Ted Cruz
subject: SCOTUS – The One Institution the Left Hasn’t Corrupted!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TQ09UVVMtRGVjaXNpb25zXzIwMjMwNzA3JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U0NPVFVTLURlY2lzaW9ucyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHIn0/zbRnm5zgx4v7Vd2oFh3hOg)
---
Fellow Conservative, Three years ago, I authored a book titled _One Seat Away: How a Single Supreme Court Seat Can Change History_. Since then, we have seen just how much every seat matters.

Just over a year ago, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade on a 5-4 vote. And this summer, we’ve celebrated landmark decision after landmark decision for what’s just and right. _**The Supreme Court is the one institution that the left hasn’t corrupted!**_
---
* The use of affirmative action in college admissions has been ruled unconstitutional.

* Joe Biden’s trillion-dollar illegal student loan forgiveness scheme – designed to buy young people’s votes next November – has been halted.

* And the Supreme Court has upheld the right of individuals to speak in their voice and live according to their faith – ruling that businesses cannot be forced to do work they fundamentally disagree with.

---
[__**Check out a must-listen episode of Verdict to learn more >>>**__](http://trk.tedcruz.-dLOOyznF2t04bacgIZbQ)
---
The left is absolutely LOSING IT over these decisions and Supreme Court justices who dare to disagree with them are under relentless attack by the Democrats and the liberal media.

**We must stand strong and continue to fight for our conservative values and the rule of law, and I’m counting on your help at this critical time!** [_**Please make a $10, $25, $50, or $100 donation today – or more if you can – to support our important work at Team Cruz >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TQ09UVVMtRGVjaXNpb25zXzIwMjMwNzA3JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U0NPVFVTLURlY2lzaW9ucyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHIn0/8P3MSTcyLQKUQWiFS6M40g) For Liberty,

name: Zak Malamed
subject: What matters most to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
This will inform our policy priorities.
#
Winning this race is about more than defeating George Santos.
**The reason I am running for Congress** is to deliver results for my hometown, my neighbors, and the everyday Americans that Santos and his MAGA cronies have been ignoring.
Unlike them, I am not here to ignore your concerns and waste time and resources pushing an extreme agenda — **I am here to listen and act.** This leads me to an important question...
[**Which issues matter most to you? My team has put together a simple, 30-second survey where you can share what’s on your mind and what you would like to see our campaign focus on.**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230708&akid=150%2E8507%2E0pSU0a)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230708&akid=150%2E8507%2E0pSU0a)**
_Based on your responses, I will share more on how these issues affect our community and how I plan to address them when I am in Congress._
My hometown, New York’s 3rd congressional district, is not the same as it was when I was growing up.
This district has always been a place where families like mine could put down roots so their kids could grow up and prosper, with both access to the opportunity of the city and the community of the suburbs. However, **it has become too expensive and too hard to make a life here.**

Families who have been here for generations are watching their children move away. Home prices and rents are up. Local businesses are struggling with inflation. Residents aren’t sure what the future holds.
On top of that, our nation is struggling to address climate change, protect abortion rights, and provide crucial funding and support for public teachers and students.
**These are just a few of the issues on my mind and the minds of my neighbors** — both Republicans and Democrats alike. But for me to provide the kind of honest, action-driven representation we all deserve, I need to hear from as many people as possible.
[**Will you take 30 seconds to respond to our Issues Survey?**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230708&akid=150%2E8507%2E0pSU0a)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230708&akid=150%2E8507%2E0pSU0a)**
Thanks for taking the time, I really appreciate it.
— Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=150%2E8507%2E0pSU0a)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=150%2E8507%2E0pSU0a)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661987%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dmfRZyoku0eMRColhy7cGQ&sysid=1 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zyozyP2f%2f%2bW1I%2f4EtBgeyQ&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7lks4RV2QvtZhfDs6kTFag&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: I’m running to be the next Governor of Louisiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana
body:
It’s going to take all of us to win this tough race, so I’m asking you to join my team.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66153970/415517299/1770480027?refcode=emonboarding1_LOGO&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTA2OTM0ZjEtOTcxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sJvelEK63ws5H66ZSl2EtWi9xsLDlIohJIsMTRD7lBU=)
---
Peter, **I'm Shawn Wilson, and I’m running to be the next Governor of Louisiana.** Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Department of Transportation and Development at a time when Louisiana faced record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds, and planning had not even begun on many of the big infrastructure projects we've needed for decades. _So I got to work._ We brought together local, state, and federal leaders. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. Business owners, farmers, neighborhood associations, and everyone in between to build consensus. The successes we achieved were possible because we put political differences aside, bridged the divide, and came together to make meaningful progress. That’s the only way to move Louisiana forward. **And that’s why I’m running to be your next Governor, and I’m asking you to join my team.** **[It’s going to take all of us to win this tough race, and I’m going to ask you to take your first step in your support. clean_body: It’s going to take all of us to win this tough race, so I’m asking you to join my team. = Peter, I'm Shawn Wilson, and I’m running to be the next Governor of Louisiana. Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Department of Transportation and Development at a time when Louisiana faced record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds, and planning had not even begun on many of the big infrastructure projects we've needed for decades. So I got to work. We brought together local, state, and federal leaders. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. Business owners, farmers, neighborhood associations, and everyone in between to build consensus. The successes we achieved were possible because we put political differences aside, bridged the divide, and came together to make meaningful progress. That’s the only way to move Louisiana forward. And that’s why I’m running to be your next Governor, and I’m asking you to join my team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Shawn Wilson | | = | = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Will you add your name to endorse Ilhan Omar today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
No one — not Ilhan Omar or anyone else — can take on the right-wing and the extremist Republicans alone.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=330%2E791427%2EO2WcuB)
Friends -
Thanks to the continued support of countless progressives like you — from Minnesota and across the country — Ilhan is proudly serving her third term fighting for our movement in Congress.
So far this year, thousands of people have added their name to say they're with her — to say they endorse our fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, an end to endless wars, workers' rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and for justice in all its forms.
But the truth is, we're going to need to continue building on this momentum if we're going to win again in 2024 and beyond.
**That's why we're asking you to join us today:**
**[Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Ilhan Omar and our people-powered campaign for Congress? Ilhan is counting on ALL of us so that we can continue our movement's collective struggle for justice.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230708-personal-endorse/?source=em230708-1-subs&refcode2=330.791427.O2WcuB&akid=330%2E791427%2EO2WcuB)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230708-personal-endorse/?source=em230708-1-subs&refcode2=330.791427.O2WcuB&akid=330%2E791427%2EO2WcuB)**
It may seem like a small gesture, but adding your name today will speak volumes about the incredible grassroots strength Ilhan has by her side.
That's because no one — not Ilhan Omar or anyone else — can take on the right-wing and the extremist Republicans alone. That's something that will ONLY happen if we're all in this together.
Thanks for being a part of our campaign.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

The significance of this moment cannot be overstated. Ohio’s congressional districts have long been plagued by partisan gerrymandering. The current maps have resulted in districts that dilute the voices of Ohioans in the political process.
With the recent SCOTUS ruling, the decision of whether to redraw new congressional maps again falls upon the state’s judiciary. The Ohio Supreme Court has a crucial opportunity to rectify the longstanding issue of gerrymandering and restore fairness to our electoral system. [**But to make this a reality, we need your support. clean_body: | Following the recent SCOTUS ruling in Moore v. Harper , where the court rejected the independent state legislature theory, the Ohio Supreme Court will decide if the state’s congressional maps need to be redrawn, team. = = = = The significance of this moment cannot be overstated. Ohio’s congressional districts have long been plagued by partisan gerrymandering. The current maps have resulted in districts that dilute the voices of Ohioans in the political process. With the recent SCOTUS ruling, the decision of whether to redraw new congressional maps again falls upon the state’s judiciary. The Ohio Supreme Court has a crucial opportunity to rectify the longstanding issue of gerrymandering and restore fairness to our electoral system. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Your contribution will enable us to engage in impactful advocacy efforts, rally communities, and other resources to ensure that Ohio’s congressional districts are drawn in a manner that reflects the will of the people, rather than the interests of a select few. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to justice and fairness. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

Can you rush us a donation of $15 today to help us strengthen our campaign infrastructure?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66156365/415521851/1502244568?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.08_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQ4ZTcxYS05OTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3OdEgYDW_gJTfEoRFW45pE-DjJK0hQ-prwYUHy0XTx4=) | **[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66156366/415521852/1502244568?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.08_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQ4ZTcxYS05OTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3OdEgYDW_gJTfEoRFW45pE-DjJK0hQ-prwYUHy0XTx4=)**

**Derek, the MAGA party is doing everything it can to hurt working families and degrade American values:** Threatening to cut hard-earned benefits like Social Security, holding veterans’ health care hostage, attacking abortion access, creating loopholes for the wealthiest corporations, and that’s just the start.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Joe Rogan is at it again
body:
Rogan recently hosted Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., an outspoken anti-vaxxer and petri dish of misinformation.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)
**Remember Joe Rogan, Peter?** He gave us a shout-out earlier this year because of our mission to hold misinformation engines like him accountable:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230708?refcode=em20230708&amount=5&refcode2=1215_120351_Aen-oG&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)
Well, Rogan’s at it again. He recently had Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. (an outspoken anti-vaxxer and petri dish of misinformation) on his podcast to promote his campaign for president — and it went pretty much exactly how you’d expect.
[**Before we go further, you should know that Courier and our affiliated newsrooms in 8 battleground states are working around the clock to hold bad actors like Rogan and Kennedy accountable, debunk their false claims, and deliver fact-based reporting to the communities that need it most. Can you pitch in $5 now to support our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230708?refcode=em20230708&amount=5&refcode2=1215_120351_Aen-oG&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230708?refcode=em20230708&amount=5&refcode2=1215_120351_Aen-oG&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)**
**RFK Jr.’s strategy is straight out of the COVID misinformation playbook** : He’s not making appearances in the mainstream media and he's avoiding any interactions with real journalists who might ask hard questions and hold him accountable.
Instead, he prefers to appear on podcasts hosted by people like Rogan, where he’ll be praised as an “outsider” and a “truth-teller” instead of called out for pushing **dangerous and debunked lies** about vaccines and other issues.
**The scariest part is his strategy is working**. In recent weeks RFK Jr.’s poll numbers have gone up — and the mainstream media is taking notice. They’ve even started to cover his campaign much in the same way they covered Trump in 2016.
Unfortunately, rather than getting the facts to the public and debunking misinformation, this type of profit-driven, sensationalized coverage is likely to help RFK Jr.’s campaign in the end, just as it helped Trump’s.
**That’s why Courier exists****, Peter**. Our newsrooms across 8 battleground states operate in “news deserts” that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, so our journalists are dedicated to picking up the mainstream media’s slack and calling misinformation out for what it is.
[**But it takes a lot of resources to support our newsrooms, and we’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep it up. So if you can, please pitch in $5 or any amount today to help us continue fighting back against misinformation.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230708?refcode=em20230708&amount=5&refcode2=1215_120351_Aen-oG&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230708?refcode=em20230708&amount=5&refcode2=1215_120351_Aen-oG&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)**
Thanks,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1215_120351_Aen-oG&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1215%2E120351%2EAen-oG)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Team, it’s the most basic principle of our democracy – **One person equals one vote.**

But right now, far-right Republicans in Columbus are plotting to take away our power by passing a constitutional amendment that would get rid of majority rule, ensure voters are beholden to extreme minority opinions and outside interest groups, and break the fundamental ideals of democracy.

**But we have a chance to fight back by voting NO on Issue 1 this August.**

If Issue 1 passes, it will strip away power from voters and give it all to politicians and special interest groups.

**_Ohioans have a long history of fighting for our rights, and this time is no different._ We have to stick together to ensure that one person = one vote.**

[**We need your help to reach as many voters as possible before the August 8th election. That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in today to help support The Vote No in August campaign? Anything you’re able to contribute will go directly to helping defend our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66161359/415536836/-1754175430?amount=5&refcode=em_eng_2023.07.08_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODllNjZiYS1hMTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYYD2IacF6EvvgqeKe0K9ktWYpbE_iQiNTSLF9_95Ek=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to One Person One Vote will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66161360/415536857/-1754175430?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_eng_2023.07.08_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODllNjZiYS1hMTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYYD2IacF6EvvgqeKe0K9ktWYpbE_iQiNTSLF9_95Ek=)

But we have a chance to fight back by voting NO on Issue 1 this August. If Issue 1 passes, it will strip away power from voters and give it all to politicians and special interest groups. subject: July 8, 2025

body:
Just imagine, it’s two years from today. There are two scenarios:
#
Peter,
Just imagine, it’s two years from today — July 8, 2025.
There are two scenarios:
1. **Josh Hawley is six months into his second term in the U.S. Senate.** He’s done nothing but continue to embarrass Missouri, abandon working families, and fail to bring real investment to our state — with five and a half years left as Missouri’s senior senator.

2. **Lucas Kunce has spent six months fighting for us in the U.S. Senate.** We’ve overturned the filibuster, passed nationwide protections for abortion + voting rights, and finally put our country on a path to empower working people and rebuild our forgotten communities.

**Your support could make the difference between these two realities, Peter.** Because if we’re prepared early to deliver Lucas’ message to voters all across the state and keep fighting back against the barrage of attacks from GOP insiders, we have a real shot to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat in 2024.
**[So please, will you chip in $10 or anything at all right now so we can elect Lucas Kunce and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for working people next year? name: Lt. Col. Alex Vindman, USA, Ret.
subject: Please Read: Ukraine needs us more than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
I’m not asking you to make a donation.
#
Hey there, Derek - it’s Alex Vindman.
I know your inbox is probably full of fundraising emails.
Not this one.
I just got back from Ukraine, and two weeks ago I was stunned to watch as many as 25,000 mutinous private military contractors drive within 200km of Moscow in defiance of Putin. It was chaos, to put it lightly.
And for a man considered by many (including some in the US) as “the ultimate strongman”, it was arguably the weakest Putin has ever looked on the world stage.
So, to save face, to reassert control, Putin is back to attacking civilians in Ukraine. That’s what his regime runs on — cruelty and blood. Putin and his regime are brittle and the war that they unleashed is leading to Russia’s unraveling and to dangerous times ahead.
That’s why I’m not asking you to make a donation, or to help VoteVets hit a fundraising goal today.
[**I’m just asking you to add your name in solidarity with the people of Ukraine. In the midst of their ongoing counteroffensive and after continued aggression from Putin’s genocidal regime, they need us more than ever.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230708_vv_ukraine/?source=em230708-1-15&refcode2=10594.3013755.oOF4Ih&akid=10594%2E3013755%2EoOF4Ih)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230708_vv_ukraine/?source=em230708-1-15&refcode2=10594.3013755.oOF4Ih&akid=10594%2E3013755%2EoOF4Ih)
---
I know this probably wasn’t the email you expected to read today, but small acts like this speak volumes about the kind of organization VoteVets is — and about the people who support us.
Thank you,
Lt. Col. Alex Vindman, US Army, Ret.

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=10594%2E3013755%2EoOF4Ih).

clean_body: The PA GOP still wants to destroy our democracy. = | Fellow activist, the PA GOP still wants to destroy our democracy. = The PA GOP’s nominees to run the county-level operations of the 2024 elections include county election officials who disrupted last year's elections. Refusing to certify their counties’ votes, they forced the state to sue their counties to get accurate certified results. In Allegheny County, the PA GOP didn’t even bother fielding a primary challenger against the official who voted to help Trump overturn the 2020 election by not certifying the county’s 700,000+ votes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: Our public schools deserve it
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66161993/415539314/1746233935?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmNDNmMS1hMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsHtL9Bioh4RXbHk7Sae2QIi47trmil7opHX86Xyb3s=)
---
When it comes to funding our public schools, Tennessee is sitting at the bottom of the class, Peter. Our state’s public schools fall in the BOTTOM 10 in the entire nation in overall funding, while our budget sits in surplus. Those extra dollars would be crucial in closing the educational gaps our children are facing. [**Will you add your name right now and DEMAND that Gov. Lee use the state’s surplus budget to invest in public education?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162000/415539319/-82772008?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmNDNmMS1hMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsHtL9Bioh4RXbHk7Sae2QIi47trmil7opHX86Xyb3s=&emci=737e4619-d61c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d53f43f1-a31d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162001/415539324/-82772008?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmNDNmMS1hMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsHtL9Bioh4RXbHk7Sae2QIi47trmil7opHX86Xyb3s=&emci=737e4619-d61c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d53f43f1-a31d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
---
Two BILLION dollars, Peter — that’s what’s at stake.
Two billion more dollars for teacher pay, school infrastructure, or to close literacy gaps and ensure that every Tennessean can read. Instead, policymakers are working to ensure vouchers and tax breaks for charter and private schools, while the success of our public schools hangs in the balance.
[**Our public schools deserve the investment. Teachers, students, and school professionals across Tennessee deserve well-funded schools. Can you add your name today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162002/415539325/-82772008?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmNDNmMS1hMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsHtL9Bioh4RXbHk7Sae2QIi47trmil7opHX86Xyb3s=&emci=737e4619-d61c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d53f43f1-a31d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162003/415539326/-82772008?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmNDNmMS1hMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsHtL9Bioh4RXbHk7Sae2QIi47trmil7opHX86Xyb3s=&emci=737e4619-d61c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d53f43f1-a31d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
