subject: I want to hear from you

body:
|
#
---
Hi there — I wanted to personally reach out and give you a chance to share your input with me today. **[Will you take a moment to complete Fight Like Hell PAC’s Official Priorities Survey here?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162233/415540283/-759885136?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE5ZTQwNWYtYTQxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WZx5Qsr5WuwkIEFSWTqAxwktbOo6Ia0jbr2pP8ZJw7U=&emci=e9a68d0d-cc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=219e405f-a41d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753) **Your feedback will guide our work in the weeks and months ahead, and here’s why: As Governor, I work every day to deliver change for Michiganders. But this isn’t something I can do alone: I need your input and your voice to make sure your priorities are at the center of our work. We’ve got a lot of important fights ahead of us: from protecting individual freedoms, expanding economic opportunity, and ensuring anyone can make it in Michigan — no matter where they live or who they are. It’s important for me to know what issues matter most to you and your family right now so we can best fight for you. That’s why I’m asking for your input directly. Your thoughts, ideas, and opinions matter. They inform and influence the decisions we make every single day: **[Can you take a minute (or two, tops!) to complete our Official Priorities Survey? Your feedback ensures we’re fighting for the issues that matter to you most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162234/415540284/-759885136?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE5ZTQwNWYtYTQxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WZx5Qsr5WuwkIEFSWTqAxwktbOo6Ia0jbr2pP8ZJw7U=&emci=e9a68d0d-cc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=219e405f-a41d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162235/415540285/-759885136?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230708_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE5ZTQwNWYtYTQxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WZx5Qsr5WuwkIEFSWTqAxwktbOo6Ia0jbr2pP8ZJw7U=&emci=e9a68d0d-cc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=219e405f-a41d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)

Looking forward to reading your responses, Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to condemn Israel’s attacks on West Bank cities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
The U.S. government can and must hold Israel accountable for its ongoing war crimes. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvqO9YOXONPhXjNyjdR02Kzax_hZD5SHkixL1sCMS8QeihPLwX8moa7cghC8rtaya9Tl2wyCVi4JHcSvcoetIGBskuNWfTCKZM6PK7wC8CWcB_kijPUS35cSNopNvhXnCWXs3QaIgnT2Yx2i3DbvJnQxyhQxNbYARj5vRQi3_z-Bn6SxumAtgNehksR3JD_6_DLg41RbGsSqhh7LkWSYWDhw/3xp/P8azMwM5QtCiLSjbBuKtTw/h0/3ATx2d0ZGO-7Ejqppu8L5kcRyRa9nLt-PAlsCcMqO50)
---
Friend, This week, the Israeli military escalated its recent deadly raids on West Bank cities, bombing the city of Jenin and killing children in a refugee camp. The people who were forced to flee from the Jenin refugee camp this week have been made refugees multiple times. They descend from families who came to Jenin during the 1948 Nakba, when violent militias forcibly removed close to 800,000 Indigenous Palestinians from their homelands. Clearly, the Israeli government is still trying to displace and erase Palestinians. For multiple days this week, Israeli soldiers in Jenin blocked medical assistance for wounded Palestinians by bulldozing roads, and fired on hospitals where families sought refuge. They destroyed 80% of Palestinian homes, cut off water and electricity, and shot at journalists. Remember: When the military murdered beloved Palestinian American journalist Shireen Abu Akleh last year, she was covering a military raid on Jenin. Attacks on Jenin have continued up through last week, and then again this week. **The U.S. government can and must hold Israel accountable for these ongoing war crimes.** **The Biden administration and Congress can refuse to send billions of our tax dollars to the Israeli military each year. At minimum, they can speak out and condemn these human rights violations.** [**Add your name to tell Congress and the Biden administration: Condemn this week’s war crimes, and speak out against Israel’s attacks on West Bank cities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL07CUsFEmUBVsRS4_dT_KOFDVC7C9AqHwe7S_2UZNzjm6zID2b5NqZyxU5AWzQ5wPChck1zFr5suVw4n1wVN6CpiIlHJXz4PFORd8cj4M2ZpkNmHlnbkOok__C_KGRkyWG6yKEQPwan3JT-jDpv_lVtsTETlEulub6h6BNakotWmDfOrUTUgw-QiL2YSCN-yVoPswaAmdei5SaefQnKIIdU_Vrmmz98tA9GSzAXnD8gADFb2NTJ69fJjp_fmNUIZ-6mj0vwN3atwsr_sMoINZ5U0qlPzgzmUk1jOvS9BY9SoH/3xp/P8azMwM5QtCiLSjbBuKtTw/h1/GDMVx_rYnvZh3TlRH8ohJb7opR6HC8xD7lfGSzrFl3o) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL02mvQH34A4UZobDuNeoriEZ4bT_wJamTOi90cj07yPJ-22JqCjCn6Qw_2lo4KDzorPEsHv6GHR4nsrUrEjvSicSdvrqpONxrkWwWqVGTQcmLuyEYgAGbaccnQKzHJvvEMHLTI67YO_LCIIRadeThiCwK0AxfxQ2MOMsMkQzJv26CxoiTztLapdYQFO7F7vAlcld-JjlojaC9XtDBEqGSOrE6zg-e3Nn4omwBLkU5y5-OIu1Y5SqHlmTH2WRFoUPGHXIcGGmBK7QWWJUCJssPjer_0yMB0U5H_WXDX1f6xYY2/3xp/P8azMwM5QtCiLSjbBuKtTw/h2/g-9ENm4bMG-Jp-k6YTfhgc6vJeBEALWmSeBPdlkyJXs)
---
Official military attacks have escalated dramatically this year, as have attacks by Israeli settlers.
**Top Israeli government officials have called for “another Nakba” and have openly supported increasingly horrific and frequent settler-led pogroms, where Israelis kill Palestinians and destroy their homes.**
To be clear: This is not a “conflict” between two equal sides, or between two countries. Israel’s powerful government and military keep terrorizing and oppressing the Palestinian people, who are not allowed to escape or even become citizens.
**This is an apartheid regime enacting ethnic cleansing and war crimes with American backing, bulldozers, and bullets.**
**Meanwhile, U.S. officials keep trying to silence criticism of Israel.**
They tried to block a UN event this year commemorating the Nakba, and U.S. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy tried to stop an event about the Nakba on Capitol Hill. These attempts have failed, and will continue to fail as long as we keep speaking out.
But too many U.S. officials stay silent, and this inaction enables the Israeli government to continue colonizing Palestinians with impunity.
**Without condemnation, Israel will continue to escalate violence, killing more Palestinians than last year—which was the deadliest year so far. We cannot allow this unbearable status quo to continue.**
[**Add your name if you agree: We need more members of Congress and members of the Biden administration to speak out and condemn Israel’s increasing attacks on Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL064XSdPmhCsL5yAXzygATTkXq_Ic66mdTav9q7ZhmDMvClc0WgTtzBpH0l0H6pwagZWiNYx4rvsJ8BXzbk1WCkBRF716IaR25kWR5CTvDOnBofrC7k5KGa0MxNVVy4pzBgEh5bxEm3zGsK_5fas5mCRmJyrkkByyQZDQmKlegqXK-gqxfufOWNXLhZaX2jqx_V7AeHfzhuDluQ_Ru4wKTBTM9ysJp_141mKWhY1yLVE71V80cDWYTKFxk_uNRAYJnbgS9pbWbJ4-LBWoZYh7iOljeqikLz_UFWIH2u-5zYiN/3xp/P8azMwM5QtCiLSjbBuKtTw/h3/T2AbAd_d9oV-QqviN_5G_vtmCfh0ph2cedkl4-uWpAc)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL0_sJ1oUMAufA9wQewlmvwi2uxyFzbQWu78mnVqwm1WSeS1M9m5LsXFh0GJK-IrBAox8L5aroAEes02MNmETmLFXmHIU6eDbyw4aAWxNG-nhfGhhzN3AiFlFsQvpG9uqQi-u3Uj8Hxm1WGbpsZz8JtC8Rz8JY1BMyBiajlZYGysJ0GOLZ0aiiZtivpMbA4NWP-t_MOQhJPWol2uIIXnsRg243JeLR2bS6ry2YekwXEW5eX7dyH5aJQZ6XxRUBGoV5Ri4TGhMl0NyCzi5uWVRTU2NPMacrZ75cFswlSfOi167o/3xp/P8azMwM5QtCiLSjbBuKtTw/h4/xEDOHOo8uSRlPdtMhluHxqYK39OcQttI13h99V1i_NM)
---
Thank you for taking action. We will keep fighting until Palestinians can live freely, with human dignity and equal rights.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Heating up 🔥
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162765/415542112/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTlhNTEzYy1hNzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEKC6e4yLikzm2swyX7igSGJ4jRpFrxPk6LiO4tm2ag=)
Peter,

This week, Earth set records for the warmest day in recorded history on four consecutive days, Monday through Thursday. **It was hotter than any previous day for at least the last 125,000 years.**

As a career meteorologist, I’ve been discussing how climate change affects the weather for decades. I can tell you this: the record-shattering heat is a crystal clear sign of a warmer world. And its effects on human health shouldn’t be underestimated – in fact, extreme heat is statistically the deadliest weather event in the U.S., deadlier than floods, hurricanes, or tornadoes.

There’s no denying it: extreme heat will be more frequent and intense in the coming years, and we need leaders who understand solutions like more public cooling centers, green and shaded spaces, and equitable access to public pools.

**A new kind of heat has arrived, and we must adapt.**

Thankfully, my background enables me to communicate this issue effectively with the residents of IL-17 and the American people, and to help them prepare for the heat. But my seat is up for grabs next year, and the GOP likes their chances of flipping our district red. As I write this, far-right groups are planning to throw big money behind misleading attack ads. In other words, _the Earth is heating up, and so is this race_.

**[So I thought I’d ask: will you help keep a trusted climate communicator in Congress by chipping in whatever you can today? Any amount will go a long way in such a close election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162768/415542115/2043242937?refcode=em-7.8.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTlhNTEzYy1hNzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEKC6e4yLikzm2swyX7igSGJ4jRpFrxPk6LiO4tm2ag=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66162770/415542117/2043242937?refcode=em-7.8.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTlhNTEzYy1hNzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEKC6e4yLikzm2swyX7igSGJ4jRpFrxPk6LiO4tm2ag=)

We know you're busy... but please, take a moment to read these key excerpts from the article:
"Over the course of an hour, Mr. DeSantis and his guests laid out a detailed case for **revisiting a landmark Supreme Court decision protecting the press from defamation lawsuits**."

"The decision set a higher bar for defamation lawsuits involving public figures, and for years it was viewed as sacrosanct. **That standard has empowered journalists to investigate and criticize public figures without fear that an unintentional error will result in crippling financial penalties.** "

"Mr. DeSantis, a likely Republican presidential candidate, **put the effort at the center of his war against the mainstream media.** "

"**Two justices on the conservative-majority Supreme Court, Clarence Thomas and Neil M. Gorsuch, have indicated their willingness to roll back the ruling** in written dissents in recent years..."
---

After getting backlash,he placed the blame on his young daughters. After rightly calling the Jan. 6 insurrection a “violent terrorist attack,” Cruz was pressured to apologize LIVE ON AIR for the comment. He expressed his support for overturning the ruling that legalized same-sex marriage, showing us all that he is AT LEAST one century behind the times. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Ted Cruz is AWFUL... and it’s FINALLY catching up to him. By nothing short of a MIRACLE (and the gift of running in a state that severely suppresses voters) Ted Cruz has represented Texas in the Senate for 2 terms. We can’t let him embarrass Texas for a 3rd term. But there’s a better path. Rep. Colin Allred has officially announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate – and he’s just the guy to beat MAGA crony Ted Cruz. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Why are some classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad? 🤔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Alexandria is the youngest woman in U.S. history to be elected to Congress. She was a waitress. She is Latina. She comes from a low-income background and is one of just a few working-class people elected to Congress.
That makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.
But together with your support, we’ve built a movement fighting for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[If you’d like to help support our movement, could you donate $5 or anything you can afford right now to help us start this new quarter off strong for fundraising?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230708-1.mwhsQ4&refcode=em20230708-4600-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230708-1.mwhsQ4&refcode=em20230708-4600-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)**
AOC and our movement are often labeled “extreme.” Here’s what they think makes us extreme:
* AOC believes in Medicare for All, aka guaranteed healthcare in the United States.
* AOC operates independently from either party’s establishment. So she is willing to challenge Democratic Party leadership and, when necessary, break from the party line.
* Our movement does not believe in late stage capitalism or that prioritizing the extreme pursuit of profit at any and all human/environmental costs will save us. AOC believes in cooperative economics and cooperative democracy, aka democratic socialism.

This campaign is funded by grassroots, small-dollar donations and AOC accepts $0 in corporate money (the average donation to this campaign is around $16).
[If you believe in fighting for a brighter future for all, please contribute $5 today to help us continue that collective fight. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230708-1.mwhsQ4&refcode=em20230708-4600-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230708-1?refcode=em20230708-4600-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=22&refcode2=4600_2526796_w6KSda&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230708-4600-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=23&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4600%2E2526796%2Ew6KSda)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Hi, Peter – we’re the folks campaigning to elect Greta Kemp Martin as Mississippi’s next Attorney General, and we need your help today.

Our team has been working hard in all 82 counties to tell folks how flat-out dangerous our current AG is, and how Greta will be a fighter for the people when we elect her in November. But after the primary next month, we need to be in an all-out sprint all the way to the finish line. And, Peter, that takes serious resources.

We know this team has what it takes to get Greta to the Attorney General’s office, but it’s going to take every one of us chipping in where we can. With just one month to build our campaign as much as we can before the final stretch, that means **we need your support now more than ever.**

[If everyone reading this email contributes just $5, we can ramp up our campaign the way we need to in these coming weeks. So we’re asking, Peter – can you chip in $5 or even more to elect a champion for Mississippians as our Attorney General?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66164558/415549511/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230708OneMonth_l2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzllYjAwMTItYWIxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jA_nZJ718FA8X8w6MV_dY2CJFfatmlXZMUiAi8dbilg=)
[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66164559/415549512/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230708OneMonth_b2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzllYjAwMTItYWIxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jA_nZJ718FA8X8w6MV_dY2CJFfatmlXZMUiAi8dbilg=)
Let’s do this,

Greta for AG HQ
Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state. = Paid for by Greta Martin for AG Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General PO BOX 16402 Jackson, MS 39236 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter, Callie is on a roll! Over the past few weeks, she’s been up and down the First District talking to voters and visiting communities. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66164920/415550818/-1515957801?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230708travel_tcb_90DA_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzM4ZTk3MGYtYWUxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JMlASmnmsnzbsptG2gNVYVUnLjp7tlPsd--0B134fhs=)

Here’s a quick sample of where Callie’s been in the past few weeks:
* Iron Mountain to meet with the Dickinson County Democrats
* Marquette for Marquette Pride
* Houghton to speak at the Spring Fling Fundraiser
* Sault Saint Marie to meet with the Chippewa County Democrats
* Alpena to meet with the Alpena County Democrats
* Benzie to meet with the Benzie County Democrats
* Cheboygan to speak at the CCDP Spring Fundraiser
* Watersmeet to speak with the Gogebic County Democrats
* Marquette to speak at the Summer Sizzle event
* Escanaba to meet with the Delta County Democrats
* Fourth of July events all over the district

**We know Callie is the right fit for the First District because she’s _from_ here.** More than that, she and Matt have chosen to raise their kids in the same great region where they grew up – because they understand the value and beauty of growing up right here in Northern Michigan.
If there’s an event, location, or meeting that you think Callie should visit in your community, reply to this email and get in touch with our team!
(We can’t promise that she’ll be able to make it to every event, but if you let us know, we’ll try to get her there!)
[In the meantime, consider making a donation to our campaign to help us cover the cost of all this travel. Every cent helps us reach all 36 counties of MI-01!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66164921/415550819/-1515957801?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230708travel_tcb_90DA_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzM4ZTk3MGYtYWUxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JMlASmnmsnzbsptG2gNVYVUnLjp7tlPsd--0B134fhs=)

This Senate race is really starting to heat up, and we’re facing a tidal
wave of spending in this election.

We’re going up against a multi-millionaire who’s trying to flood the
airwaves and drown out our Maryland-first message.

That’s why I need your help to make sure we don’t get
burned, Peter.

Like any good sand castle, a campaign must be built on solid ground, or
else all our hard work could be washed away. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3467?t=1011&amount=25&akid=239%2E52803%2EKPxEOU ]Can I count on you to chip
in $25 so we can build up this campaign to withstand the tide?

worry about fundraising, so he thinks he’s got it made in the shade.

Peter: A grassroots movement
strong enough to buoy this campaign through choppy waters.

name: Working Families Party
subject: Biden's new student debt relief plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
President Biden has promised to use the authority given to his administration in the Higher Education Act to bypass the right-wing majority on the Supreme Court and deliver relief for borrowers being held hostage by the student loan crisis. | | | Pressure works, Peter. Last week, hours after the Supreme Court tossed his original plan to forgive up to $20,000 in federal student loan debt for more than 40 million people, **President Joe Biden announced that his administration was not giving up.** In remarks at the White House, President Biden promised to use the authority given to his administration in the Higher Education Act to bypass the right-wing majority on the Supreme Court and deliver relief for borrowers being held hostage by the student loan crisis. We’re not about to give up either. **We’ve only gotten as far as we have in this fight thanks to the organizers and people like you who took action and raised your voices. And we will need to keep on mobilizing to make sure student loan forgiveness reaches as many people as quickly as possible.** **[Make a contribution to help us keep up the pressure for student debt relief, and to elect more champions who will fight to make education accessible and affordable to every family in the U.S.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUAkhTbEBMGmxx70mEn5mc7CeaySqgHkeVh1SgsFhmPmacB3Eu2QYP78L6Aa-BuTFqtPxFOf0CT9SYqd8H3C0fiISI_oEEL70CO4pPZWBMLjfENF6p91myF3dX022_SlmGgv5GQW5LKXG5giCt9q0GOZlZxWEkRQruwH_j6L8Td4FLAFGA-UQxqOCD5vGX96lBDsKPbwGjXjD1bHeYJg3MQIR53jgwukEcThfqL361NUpC4kYuekZCXB2c2j0od_YXoJquVBTQoRddGDZKHlF89gP614apgpa0IvSebckUJEZ4DebGjCt-3UWj8bpKHm-QZ5zzpEoma--mcWkH1x-6lQ/3xp/jgbYUMUvSEu2hU-YJ3COUg/h0/cAe6fvP5rTOoSz3aV3Bd34FwM_oVJCYod97EiuwP2lg)** **[Contribute »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUAkhTbEBMGmxx70mEn5mc7CeaySqgHkeVh1SgsFhmPmacB3Eu2QYP78L6Aa-BuTFq6F37jA4pDObGgvOJIcshcDQf7WEo94gnH1LUsY6mI696BLba9_7eQOVh_V2Ef8srJ4wesuqCZVm5FRQMEBHS35EY_eJvvuMDhmvKKbYV5Exioum8nAf0OiXIWx5LFRq1OSad8K3prariVzIWxMB_4eSGMW93RWPMiB7zF78GIDlZPnhU3nVIUIaDa-_2Bekd13YR1I_qxTYJ60oV3V58WsBi1UknOecRCkM5af7Ot1u-yf61m_b_Jl7-rpAvcn6dGj-TYpfuISVpgdL0zeC2mA/3xp/jgbYUMUvSEu2hU-YJ3COUg/h1/ZcNlRWAjA3cvChbPWUBGUhthxk1LUUJSOPQdT1gWpEA)** Our fight is far from over, Peter. Year after year, Republicans make it harder for young people to attend college, and reward predatory lenders that keep students trapped in debt. And we know that interest will continue to pile up on the principal balance for many, with many debtors ending up owing significantly more than they already did — even with Biden’s announcement that he will move to a “Plan B” on student debt relief, and his plan for a new 12-month on-ramp repayment program that temporarily removes the threat of default or credit score impact if borrowers can’t name: Team Fetterman
subject: the summer ☀️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
It's the summer time and folks are trying to spend as much time outside as possible — us too! We're trying to enjoy the sunshine as much as possible this weekend. ☀️
Buuuuuut, the reality is that we're experiencing a summer slump. Typically fundraising goes down during this time, and we can't leave anything on the table.
So much of our grassroots support comes from folks chipping in a few dollars here and there, and right now, we're hoping folks will spend a few dollars here.
**[That's why we have to ask: will you donate $5 so our team can get over our summer slowdown? You can donate at the button below:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230708-1?refcode=em20230708-1-8449&refcode2=8449_434096_GIxzkC&akid=8449%2E434096%2EGIxzkC)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230708-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230708-8449&refcode2=8449_434096_GIxzkC&akid=8449%2E434096%2EGIxzkC)**
We'll keep it short and wrap it up there. Hope you can make it outside and enjoy the sun!
Thank you for your continued support,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230708-8449-footer&t=1&refcode2=8449_434096_GIxzkC&akid=8449%2E434096%2EGIxzkC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8449%2E434096%2EGIxzkC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8449%2E434096%2EGIxzkC)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Hey, team, what are your socials?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey there,

Mondaire has officially launched his campaign to flip NY-17, and we’re already feeling the momentum on our side.

Everyone from teachers, service workers, students, parents, LGBTQ+ allies and activists, renters, small business owners, and folks from all walks of life have stepped up in support, and the enthusiasm is _incredible._

But it’s not entirely surprising. Everyday people of the Lower Hudson Valley already know Mondaire has their back. He’s proven it by working day in and day out in Congress for the community that raised and supported him. And he’s ready to do it again.

**Mondaire is running a campaign for all of us, and we want you with us every step of the way. Make sure you stay in the loop by following along with the campaign by liking and following Mondaire on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram today!**

name: Team Kroemer
subject: David Schweikert is a corrupt extremist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress

* David Schweikert has been in Congress for over 10 years, but he has nothing to show for it aside from **multiple ethics violations.**

* He has the support of the Republican establishment, corporate PACs, and special interests, with **Donald Trump endorsing him** in last year’s election.

It’s clear that David Schweikert is a corrupt extremist that doesn’t belong in Congress.

Peter,

There’s a new Mississippi law that is about to make it _ridiculously_ easy to kick voters off the state's election rolls.

With time slipping away _(we’re one month out from the primary election!)_ , we need to move fast to fight back against Tate Reeves and his cronies.

**Today, we’re announcing a new campaign initiative to re-register as many Mississippi voters as we can ASAP. We want EVERY voter, no matter their voting history, to have a chance to make their voices heard!

[But here's the catch: We need to raise at least $5,000 by the end of today to make this program a success. Can you donate right away to help us re-register as many voters as we can in Mississippi and defeat Tate Reeves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66165560/415553485/-1470085607?refcode=ea.779332f0-b01d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.779332f0-b01d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc5MzMyZjAtYjAxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zn8dFNEsgT_3JZt9hdzT-ZmF0pF3g4f_g7txOfSi4CE=)**

Every dollar we raise will go towards important resources, like hiring lawyers and expanding our campaign staff. We'll also use the funds for direct outreach efforts, including phone calls and door-knocking to connect with voters directly.

Believe us. Your investment will make a huge difference.

But if we don't act now, thousands of voters could be disenfranchised, and the integrity of future elections will be compromised. Plain and simple.

It’s do or die for us, Peter. The more you donate, the more people we can reach.

[We can’t let Tate Reeves use his anti-voting law to cheat his way to victory. clean_body: This isn’t a drill. | = Peter, There’s a new Mississippi law that is about to make it ridiculously easy to kick voters off the state's election rolls. With time slipping away (we’re one month out from the primary election!) , we need to move fast to fight back against Tate Reeves and his cronies. Today, we’re announcing a new campaign initiative to re-register as many Mississippi voters as we can ASAP. We want EVERY voter, no matter their voting history, to have a chance to make their voices heard! = Every dollar we raise will go towards important resources, like hiring lawyers and expanding our campaign staff. We'll also use the funds for direct outreach efforts, including phone calls and door-knocking to connect with voters directly. Believe us. Your investment will make a huge difference. But if we don't act now, thousands of voters could be disenfranchised, and the integrity of future elections will be compromised. Plain and simple. It’s do or die for us, Peter. The more you donate, the more people we can reach. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. name: Governor Tim Walz via Blue Amp Action
subject: Seizing the moment
body:
I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in Minnesota:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0231b1b8-7090-46eb-8612-c0751dd8b795/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. **In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste.** So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. [If you are ready to embark on this journey with me as we look to defend and expand on our progress over the coming year and beyond, I’m asking you to join our movement by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4e82b92-ec56-40f8-8e09-61094a60c9da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1364c61b-a9b7-4eab-b7c9-5c11742bf434/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. **[Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc39c883-a37e-4be9-8cd7-c3d5ce58b9eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ , if you’re with me, split a donation that works for you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us build this movement.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T516777eb-bd03-4c6b-a9f0-9d6ab3b4066c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** I’m grateful, Gov. Tim Walz [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64295248-3011-41b1-b094-80218ee518c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0cea838-005f-4f38-a16f-33a6be277e47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_90do_timwalz_23070814?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d72d8f95-b980-4f8d-98f4-b7f024989a6d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d72d8f95-b980-4f8d-98f4-b7f024989a6d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: 📝 Have you taken Kim's survey yet?

body:

Kim's top priority is ensuring that the people of Washington's 8th District know they are heard and that she's fighting for the issues that matter to them.

That's why Kim wants you to take the survey today. As we look ahead to the rest of the year, knowing what issues are on the top of your mind is critical.

**[Team, ensure your voice is heard today. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Emerging Leaders Project
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
[https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/BSFQeo0edqKsbIgMQQ2nu1KXNYHOTk3kpAwrpHHifeuCWv-4OMnHROd88PkhP33hyWZ4GUVGfok1RDufc0IE8lejgG2ljWiyu0YI1sYHFkTsOODH8X5VH9FQqpZPF9GRx1j1KS5oSJjU1HZTwjQVSQY]

Peter,

The deadline to apply for the Emerging Leaders Project 2023-24 class is coming up!

As an independent nonprofit organization, the Emerging Leaders Project partners with the Indiana Democratic Party to help build our party's bench of future candidates, leaders, campaign staffers, and activists. Each year up to 40 Hoosiers, between 21 and 40 years old, are selected from around the state to participate in this free year-long program. Those selected attend a series of training conferences in Indianapolis that cover all aspects of campaigning for office, public policy, and party building.

Learn more about the Emerging Leaders Project and apply to join the 2023-24 class here. [https://www.emergingleadersproject.org/?refcode=230501-Leaders&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D]

Founded in 2011, the Emerging Leaders Project has helped hundreds of young Democrats become more active in the party and run for office. From Congressional candidates to state legislators, to countywide elected officials and municipal office holders to Democratic Party leaders at the local and district levels, the Emerging Leaders Project has a long track record of success. See our list of Alumni here! [https://www.emergingleadersproject.org/past-classes?refcode=230501-Leaders&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D]

If you are an Indiana resident between the ages of 21 and 40 and have an interest in running for office in the near future, working on a campaign, or helping to strengthen your local Democratic Party, this program is for you! And if you are a loyal Democrat who knows of an up-and-coming young leader who could help make our party and state stronger, please share this email with them.

Apply before the July 15th deadline here! [https://form.jotform.com/230994294256163?refcode=230501-Leaders&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D]

Democratically yours,
Jeff Harris
Chair, Emerging Leaders Project

name: Team Emilia
subject: Quick update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Peter – We wanted to share a quick update on where our race stands right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66167096/415557991/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.08_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGZmNTUwNi1iNDFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmHJJ9PG9ex_1znaY7vaKDeDsiopJlqwAfXffDILdng=) Peter – We wanted to share a quick update on where our race stands right now.

📰 _**First:**_ Leading non-partisan election forecasters called OH-13 a **pure TOSS-UP race** , meaning our election could go either way.

❌ _**Then:**_ Our former opponent – **a Trump-backed, anti-choice, Fox News commentator – filed t o challenge Emilia** and run again in 2024.

🎯 _**Now:**_ Republicans are wasting no time in preparing to attack and unseat Emilia. In fact, **our district has been rated as one of the GOP’s top targets** for the 2024 election cycle.

name: Colin Allred HQ
subject: did you see what Ted Cruz said about this race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/cruz.png]
Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.
There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it .
Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.
We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, friend:
Please, rush $5, $10, or any amount you can spare to split between our campaign and Serve America so that we can compete with Ted Cruz's massive war chest. Every dollar will go toward our fight to flip Texas blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thanks for giving what you can to help us defeat Ted Cruz! Together, we can hold him accountable, flip Texas blue and defend the Senate.

name: James Comer
subject: I don't think Rep. Jeffries is looking at the same evidence the rest of America is...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930837:6b0kVoIcN:m:1:3299561967:38254667357074AC9E037350C799D493:r)
---
|
---
Patriot, Hakeem Jeffries, the top House Democrat, accused me of being "out of control and unhinged" in my investigation of Joe Biden and his family's shady business schemes, but he didn't stop there... Hakeem said _ "The House Oversight Committee, under the extreme MAGA Republican leadership from the very beginning of this current Congress up until this point, has been a big failure. They have not uncovered anything that is in any way evidence of wrongdoing."_ **_" They just peddle conspiracy theory after conspiracy theory after conspiracy theory, without any meaningful evidence to move forward."_**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930837:6b0kVoIcN:m:1:3299561967:38254667357074AC9E037350C799D493:r)
---
I don't think Rep. Jeffries is looking at the same evidence the rest of America is, but I can assure you his false attacks aren't the least bit true. This is exactly why I'm conducting my investigation by the book, **rigorously and deliberately crossing every "t" and dotting every "i".** The Democrats' lies and deception to cover for their crooked President won't stand up to the scrutiny of just a glance at the facts I've uncovered and the process I've used exposing them. I'm going to be straight with you, it's not fun being attacked and labeled a liar and a phony, but having support from friends like you makes it bearable. [**If you're able, I'd really appreciate it if you'd show your support with a donation today****.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930837:6b0kVoIcN:m:1:3299561967:38254667357074AC9E037350C799D493:r) Even though we're having to fight the FBI, fight the DOJ, fight the Democrats in Congress and fight the mainstream media, we're on the right track and we're going to be uncovering A LOT more information to share with the public very soon. We may be fighting all those folks I just named above, but we're doing it together, and together we'll prevail.
With Courage,
James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

clean_body: | | | Patriot, Hakeem Jeffries, the top House Democrat, accused me of being "out of control and unhinged" in my investigation of Joe Biden and his family's shady business schemes, but he didn't stop there... Hakeem said "The House Oversight Committee, under the extreme MAGA Republican leadership from the very beginning of this current Congress up until this point, has been a big failure. They have not uncovered anything that is in any way evidence of wrongdoing." " They just peddle conspiracy theory after conspiracy theory after conspiracy theory, without any meaningful evidence to move forward." | I don't think Rep. Jeffries is looking at the same evidence the rest of America is, but I can assure you his false attacks aren't the least bit true. This is exactly why I'm conducting my investigation by the book, rigorously and deliberately crossing every "t" and dotting every "i". The Democrats' lies and deception to cover for their crooked President won't stand up to the scrutiny of just a glance at the facts I've uncovered and the process I've used exposing them. I'm going to be straight with you, it's not fun being attacked and labeled a liar and a phony, but having support from friends like you makes it bearable. Even though we're having to fight the FBI, fight the DOJ, fight the Democrats in Congress and fight the mainstream media, we're on the right track and we're going to be uncovering A LOT more information to share with the public very soon. We may be fighting all those folks I just named above, but we're doing it together, and together we'll prevail. name: Jon Tester
subject: my grandparents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Hi Peter.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66169547/415561057/-890498101?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230708_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZDA2OWM3LWI4MWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V_tCmh1MiQXC63cYFyQjwyYn3-jmRc2bSkWfPCp5i0k=) That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

**I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that works for them.**

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. **I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the outside groups and Republican attacks.**

[**Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66169548/415561058/-890498101?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230708_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZDA2OWM3LWI4MWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V_tCmh1MiQXC63cYFyQjwyYn3-jmRc2bSkWfPCp5i0k=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66169554/415561064/-890498101?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230708_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZDA2OWM3LWI4MWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V_tCmh1MiQXC63cYFyQjwyYn3-jmRc2bSkWfPCp5i0k=)

[Bay Pines VA welcomes summer student volunteers](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zreumhp9mml5jcdo6md2865etli4rj34c5v594v8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3imcor6c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1jmf830suh38d7lk1qb7d9memhn8dd7ekorcdtlmkr7b9jlemqracjlkponas9l6eonb8rnm6qn7cbl6kp7ctt24no)
Bay Pines VA welcomed 39 student volunteers to its summer program during an orientation in early June. The annual program affords local students the opportunity to work with other Veteran volunteers and employees as part of Bay Pine's Center for Development and Civic Engagement (CDCE).

clean_body: Bay Pines VA welcomed 39 student volunteers to its summer program | Defending America at Home and Abroad | | | | | Bay Pines VA welcomed 39 student volunteers to its summer program during an orientation in early June. # Big Things Brewing: Unveiling Our Gen Z Influencer Army, Led by the Inimitable Cam Higby!
Dear Patriots,
Hope this message finds you trumped up and ready for the latest round of MAGA magic! This is Robert Duran IV, your proudly atypical President of Rethink! GOP – the behemoth in the game of ballot harvesting and early voting.
Alright, no more suspense, let's get down to the business. You've all been patiently waiting, and today we're here to drop the metaphorical mother of all bombs on the political scene. You might want to sit down for this one, folks.
_Drumroll, please._
We are ecstatic, over-the-moon, and brimming with patriotic fervor to announce the foundation of the nation's LARGEST influencer army. That's right, we're assembling a group of influential titans, armed with their mighty words and a lion's share of wit.
"But who's leading this cavalry of charisma?" I hear you ask. Hold on to your red hats, folks, because the answer is going to blow you away. It's none other than the mastermind of the meme world, the sultan of social media, the sovereign of sass - Cam Higby!
[**Secure the future of American democracy today - Click here to donate and support the Rethink! GOP initiative!**](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=8c29016f65&e=c5b02c41f0)
[](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=2ebf231cbe&e=c5b02c41f0)
[**Secure the future of American democracy today - Click here to donate and support the Rethink! GOP initiative!**](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=3c3318f6f1&e=c5b02c41f0)
Who's Cam Higby, you say? Well, you must have been living under a rock! He's the man who turned Twitter into Twit-WOW, Instagram into Insta-BAM, and Facebook into... well, a face worth looking at!
Jokes aside, Cam's resume is as impressive as the size of our ambition. He’s a visionary, a digi-wizard, and above all, he's got a heart that beats to the rhythm of GOP values.
So, as we embark on this new journey, we're counting on your unyielding support, friends. We're about to create a digital hurricane, a tidal wave of influence that will reshape the political landscape.
Best,
**Robert Duran IV** PresidentRethink! GOP

name: Jon Tester
subject: We’re running this campaign differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi there.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding
day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of
grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18990?t=1001&akid=3376%2E346206%2EWMv_EA ][IMG]

That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up;
and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating
windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much
everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out
the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up
enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had
a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill,
their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong
muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking
Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our
teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that
works for them.

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing
special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then
make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign
differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what
you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the
outside groups and Republican attacks.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18990?t=1002&akid=3376%2E346206%2EWMv_EA ]Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign
and Charles Booker? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of
our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win.

CHIP IN →

Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in Washington fighting
for the little guy.

Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18990?t=1003&akid=3376%2E346206%2EWMv_EA ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230708-3376-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3376_346206_WMv_EA&akid=3376%2E346206%2EWMv_EA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3376%2E346206%2EWMv_EA

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Court Watch (via the NDRC)
subject: Here’s why the Supreme Court overturned Alabama’s maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
And what it means for 2024
|
---

**For too long, gerrymandered districts in Alabama denied Black voters the right to equal representation.**

Black people make up over a quarter of Alabama’s population. But under maps passed by Alabama Republicans, _only one_ of the state’s seven congressional districts offered majority-Black representation. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66174086/415565468/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230708_FR_7H_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmZWNiZTZkLWJiMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ckfBpTy34GY49vXZzQ7xYd7J52aQH4GUO9eFmxMQA6g=)
---
[**_Help fight for fair maps across the country: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66174089/415565469/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230708_FR_7H_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmZWNiZTZkLWJiMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ckfBpTy34GY49vXZzQ7xYd7J52aQH4GUO9eFmxMQA6g=)
But we have good news, team: The Supreme Court’s recent decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ struck down these maps for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. As a result, Alabama must now implement new, fair maps that include an additional majority-black district.

**The Court’s decision means that, for the first time in nearly 150 years, Black Alabamans will be able to vote for the candidate of their choice in more than one congressional district. President Obama called it “An important victory for Black Alabamians and voters of color across the country.”**

_He’s right!_ Already, Louisiana lawmakers have been ordered to draw new maps with an additional majority-minority district before the next election. Similar challenges could lead to maps being redrawn in states like Arkansas, Georgia, South Carolina, and Texas.
**Our movement for fair maps helped make this happen, team. Now, we need to seize this momentum to continue fighting for fairness all across the country. Will you rush a donation to the NDRC now to support all our work?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: And what it means for 2024 | For too long, gerrymandered districts in Alabama denied Black voters the right to equal representation. Black people make up over a quarter of Alabama’s population. But under maps passed by Alabama Republicans, only one of the state’s seven congressional districts offered majority-Black representation. | = = But we have good news, team: The Supreme Court’s recent decision in Allen v. Milligan struck down these maps for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. As a result, Alabama must now implement new, fair maps that include an additional majority-black district. The Court’s decision means that, for the first time in nearly 150 years, Black Alabamans will be able to vote for the candidate of their choice in more than one congressional district. President Obama called it “An important victory for Black Alabamians and voters of color across the country.” He’s right! Already, Louisiana lawmakers have been ordered to draw new maps with an additional majority-minority district before the next election. Similar challenges could lead to maps being redrawn in states like Arkansas, Georgia, South Carolina, and Texas. Our movement for fair maps helped make this happen, team. Now, we need to seize this momentum to continue fighting for fairness all across the country. Will you rush a donation to the NDRC now to support all our work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. Folks, We are living in a pivotal moment — _yet so many pressing issues are going unsolved_ because legislators would rather focus on scoring political points than put our country first. That’s not Jason’s M.O. He’s always gone where the fight is, no matter the odds. Because safeguarding every woman’s right to choose is worth it. Because having access to clean air and water is worth it. Because fighting to give veterans the respect and benefits they deserve — instead of treating our servicemembers like political pawns — is worth it. Because defending every cent of Medicare and Social Security is worth it. Because defending our democracy is worth it. Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters across the country, pitching in what they can to advance our people-first agenda. body:
We are in an affordable housing crisis. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66177670/415567747/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDA0ZTE1Zi1iZTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XlwioSd_skGf2_DieSM9MJulKseslJHyF6TKDP7KARo=&emci=af04e15f-be1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b004e15f-be1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

New Mexico and our nation are facing a massive housing crisis, friends: **Almost 1 in 4 renters are forced to use more than half of their income to pay rent.** That’s money they can’t spend on groceries, childcare, healthcare, and other household expenses. That’s why Martin is a co-sponsor of the _Affordable Housing Credit Improvement Act_ , which will help strengthen the Low-Income Housing Tax Credit and give New Mexico the resources to build more than 14,000 new homes over the next 10 years. **[Will you support affordable housing by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the _Affordable Housing Credit Improvement Act_? Add your name next to Martin’s:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66177671/415567748/-1170534214?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDA0ZTE1Zi1iZTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XlwioSd_skGf2_DieSM9MJulKseslJHyF6TKDP7KARo=&emci=af04e15f-be1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b004e15f-be1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66177672/415567749/-1170534214?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDA0ZTE1Zi1iZTFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XlwioSd_skGf2_DieSM9MJulKseslJHyF6TKDP7KARo=&emci=af04e15f-be1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b004e15f-be1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

name: Cori Bush
subject: [take action] Stop Kevin McCarthy’s Social Security-cutting commission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
As FDR said in the summer of 1941, “no damn politician can ever scrap my Social Security program!” | |
---
Peter, For more than 80 years, Social Security has been a promise to seniors that if you take a part of your paycheck and contribute, you will be able to retire with grace and dignity. Over the years this promise has been extended to include people with disabilities and surviving spouses. Nearly 65 million people rely on Social Security benefits each year, including 131,000 in my home state of Missouri. They’re relying on a fully funded Social Security program. **But, instead of strengthening and protecting Social Security for current and future generations, extreme MAGA Republicans want to end Social Security as we know it.** When they attack Social Security’s promise, they’re attacking some of our most vulnerable communities -- seniors who rely on Meals on Wheels, people with disabilities who are unable to work, and dependents who have lost a parent or spouse. **Now, Speaker Kevin McCarthy has called for a so-called “bipartisan” commission to cut our hard earned Social Security benefits.** But it’ll only be bipartisan if Democrats join him on his commission. Let me be clear: I will not participate or support this commission, but there are other Democrats who might. [**We must stand united together. Add your name today to tell Democrats to stop McCarthy’s commission and protect Social clean_body: As FDR said in the summer of 1941, “no damn politician can ever scrap my Social Security program!” | | Peter, For more than 80 years, Social Security has been a promise to seniors that if you take a part of your paycheck and contribute, you will be able to retire with grace and dignity. Over the years this promise has been extended to include people with disabilities and surviving spouses. Nearly 65 million people rely on Social Security benefits each year, including 131,000 in my home state of Missouri. They’re relying on a fully funded Social Security program. But, instead of strengthening and protecting Social Security for current and future generations, extreme MAGA Republicans want to end Social Security as we know it. When they attack Social Security’s promise, they’re attacking some of our most vulnerable communities -- seniors who rely on Meals on Wheels, people with disabilities who are unable to work, and dependents who have lost a parent or spouse. Now, Speaker Kevin McCarthy has called for a so-called “bipartisan” commission to cut our hard earned Social Security benefits. But it’ll only be bipartisan if Democrats join him on his commission. Let me be clear: I will not participate or support this commission, but there are other Democrats who might. Social Security is a lifesaving program and we need to ensure it’s here to stay. As FDR said in the summer of 1941, one year after the first Social Security checks were mailed out, “no damn politician can ever scrap my Social Security program!”[1] As Democrats we must be committed to strengthening and expanding Social Security. This means ensuring the wealthy pay their fair share so we can increase benefits and extend the lifespan of the trust fund. And it means stopping MAGA Republicans’ attempts to cut our earned benefits. We believe in saving lives and showing up for our communities. Thank you for taking action today. With love, Cori ** [1] Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cori Bush for Congress, please .

That’s how much my Democrat opponent Jon Tester raised last quarter to keep Montana’s battleground Senate seat in Democrats’ hands, Fellow Conservative. We’re over a year from the election and Tester already has $10,000,000 in his bank account, with millions more already flooding in from every elite ultra-liberal megadonor in the country. Pro-Trump Republicans outnumber Democrats in Montana. They know they can’t win a fair fight, so they’re trying to buy my opponent’s re-election. If I can’t keep up with these record-breaking fundraising numbers, I’m going to be buried in a flood of Leftist propaganda and outright lies. My team has set up a 24-hour fundraising target of $30,000 that’ll give us the tools and resources we need to keep pace with the Democrats’ fundraising operation. I haven’t been in the race for two weeks yet and the Democrats have shown they have no limits on what they’ll say to maintain their grip on power. I’ve already been the focus of repeated lies and Leftist propaganda – and it’ll only get worse. Democrats know this seat is extremely vulnerable and losing it will cost them the majority in 2024. body:
It’s no secret: the far-right is attacking the right to vote in Pennsylvania.

**Sign On:[Protect our Democracy and Save Voting Rights >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66181831/415572572/54261591?refcode=email_070823_voting-rights&source=email_070823_voting-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGM4YmVmYS1jODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9X7LLg3JE9_VbgdKoskS0Cj2kdgR9k6xIPLVvvVdf0=&emci=cc56286b-081d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b4c8befa-c81d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)** It’s no secret: the far-right is attacking the right to vote in Pennsylvania.

In 2020, Pennsylvania was on the frontlines of the battle against Trump’s Big Lie. The former president filed outlandish lawsuits to try to overturn Pennsylvania’s election results.

**And Derek, as we gear up for another critical election in 2024, we can only expect their attacks to continue.** So we need to do everything we can to secure our democracy and make it easier for people to vote – not put up barriers to the ballot box.

**[Josh Shapiro believes the right to vote is sacred, and is leading the fight to protect our democracy at every turn. Will you sign on to join the fight to save voting rights and protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66181832/415572573/54261591?refcode=email_070823_voting-rights&source=email_070823_voting-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGM4YmVmYS1jODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9X7LLg3JE9_VbgdKoskS0Cj2kdgR9k6xIPLVvvVdf0=&emci=cc56286b-081d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b4c8befa-c81d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)** | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66181833/415572574/54261591?refcode=email_070823_voting-rights&source=email_070823_voting-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGM4YmVmYS1jODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9X7LLg3JE9_VbgdKoskS0Cj2kdgR9k6xIPLVvvVdf0=&emci=cc56286b-081d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b4c8befa-c81d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)

As our Attorney General, Josh Shapiro went to court time and time again to defend Pennsylvanians’ right to vote and ensure every legal vote was counted.

Now as our Governor, he’s leading the fight to make it easier to register to vote and cast your ballot, while ensuring that our elections are secure and conducted with integrity.

Now more than ever, we need to stand together to ensure every voice is heard in our democracy – and fight back against every single attempt to suppress the right to vote.

**So Derek, can we count on you to sign your name and help us defend voting rights and secure our democracy?

clean_body: It’s no secret: the far-right is attacking the right to vote in Pennsylvania. Sign On: It’s no secret: the far-right is attacking the right to vote in Pennsylvania. In 2020, Pennsylvania was on the frontlines of the battle against Trump’s Big Lie. The former president filed outlandish lawsuits to try to overturn Pennsylvania’s election results. And Derek, as we gear up for another critical election in 2024, we can only expect their attacks to continue. So we need to do everything we can to secure our democracy and make it easier for people to vote – not put up barriers to the ballot box. | | As our Attorney General, Josh Shapiro went to court time and time again to defend Pennsylvanians’ right to vote and ensure every legal vote was counted. Now as our Governor, he’s leading the fight to make it easier to register to vote and cast your ballot, while ensuring that our elections are secure and conducted with integrity. Now more than ever, we need to stand together to ensure every voice is heard in our democracy – and fight back against every single attempt to suppress the right to vote. So Derek, can we count on you to sign your name and help us defend voting rights and secure our democracy? Thanks, Team Shapiro | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: This time they’re playing for keeps
body:
| | | | | Support OMG! | Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet. | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ff1838f6c2&e=84ee529f47)

[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=fd2a6ac049&e=84ee529f47) Dear Patriot,

[**A new lawsuit could crush my investigative reporting at this crucial time for our country. Please help me beat this in court with your critical gift of $25, $50, $100 or more now.**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=38d0128b43&e=84ee529f47)

Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh’s show five years ago, you heard him say I was “an intrepid ‘guerrila journalist’ “whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets.”

I can’t tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that – the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven’t stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with – people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don’t just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don’t know why they’re doing it ... but they’re playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=fb9d93b0b1&e=84ee529f47)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**“You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it.”**

[**Patriot, will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5982bf562a&e=84ee529f47)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can’t do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

**P.S. Patriot, this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=03c83e283b&e=84ee529f47) **Thank you!
