In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with – people I wish only the best for. Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting. The people who filed it don’t just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher. I don’t know why they’re doing it ... but they’re playing for keeps. My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more. But I remember what Rush told me in that interview: “You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it.” I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES! I can’t do it without you. Thank you so much! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. Patriot, this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat. Thank you! | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Victory 2024. All rights reserved.

[**July 8, 1776:** The Liberty Bell rang out in Philadelphia, symbolizing the announcement of the Declaration of Independence. The bell's toll served as a powerful signal to the city's residents, gathering them to hear the historic document being read aloud. This event marked a significant moment in American history, signifying the formal break from British rule and the birth of a new nation founded on principles of freedom and independence.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ca430f8eae4042ca940c4fbf8f7db00d&_e=fK30yltn0s_OUBp6lmwKdszwpbhK5DXq5WvQsBObCJR6RzbTm5CAD_6Xuip7Z3REV5U-_Recv067_bq0bhasUBuHukc3CKRYNXN6cdjIdtb4il2kWP66-6Q5AaHzJco3rQF3W4CQMRRsbX8QIc5wS_g33gUzyxcxrJGtlX-4QvkPYt1_30LK0hY_-zk_mPfTfeEqqy00-N1u3GTku2QCRTZFqURO6Mo_CaVw9WS4uNjdvGGARGirjMelA4AAMgfNEuVBb0mBP5uWypG9ulvDMwt5JbU8UI2Zt0dJwudMwvk%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ca430f8eae4042ca940c4fbf8f7db00d&_e=fK30yltn0s_OUBp6lmwKdszwpbhK5DXq5WvQsBObCJR6RzbTm5CAD_6Xuip7Z3REV5U-_Recv067_bq0bhasUBuHukc3CKRYNXN6cdjIdtb4il2kWP66-6Q5AaHzJco34_SPcHZuAr7EXXwOCtwmkBPrzipFj4u3Zfdf4w2iyHqCVQ3Jlx-HYTpX7l2hKn-ClQgdugFci07ehsLioAM0NyfA_pyWUdd_tnf6wIO6NmrG13h94DLJjrhTnsMutMNtECLHeyFQvzrpvXD8cUNplltIW9rt-aAbubsmY-eflwk%3D)**

[**July 8****, 1889:** During the 1880s, Dow ventured into journalism, relocating to New York City and joining a financial news service as a reporter. Collaborating with Edward D. Jones in 1882, Dow co-founded Dow Jones & Company. This enterprise provided Wall Street financial institutions with timely bulletins, known as "flimsies" or "slips," delivered by messengers. The final delivery each day included a precursor to The Wall Street Journal, a news sheet that would pave the way for the renowned publication.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ca430f8eae4042ca940c4fbf8f7db00d&_e=fK30yltn0s_OUBp6lmwKdszwpbhK5DXq5WvQsBObCJQZzaRDICqHQqrQWG8fFc03bpf54pOSezfr-UhconHq6GsAlc3zl45B2alGeZIvRNVMOSj_BCSXixOUjCHcQL9XWS2ZDcsJekjzoM-BiiqQLDcx-ynB8b-5eM-yIDFcSKSWUD7e8YlTQ99jFG9xrXUrPcOpKAVAqtV0cGttmoD963q9vSoNhWgwADqiD2JUOvmSTowAcs23ytCgjlTOatSQuZQJ10bZQJkOKoAPYcyYmITVDhyokMfHnRpAszi1zi0z3qH2FbB5lvkxrUbFi7FC) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ca430f8eae4042ca940c4fbf8f7db00d&_e=fK30yltn0s_OUBp6lmwKdszwpbhK5DXq5WvQsBObCJQZzaRDICqHQqrQWG8fFc03bpf54pOSezfr-UhconHq6GsAlc3zl45B2alGeZIvRNVMOSj_BCSXixOUjCHcQL9XWS2ZDcsJekjzoM-BiiqQLDcx-ynB8b-5eM-yIDFcSKSYXYf4ZMSsf5qtS_im5OIDlp4Bvpd-KWnOz3zRb4NY4kWnTsupJIxBMZzTgr-QYYDLXNKVWpqYlvmg4szsZBGHtOrjoRJAwi-_azoNb588-ioeDRJdI-mYEeftWf2L-XTbMmKE5K0EyiVTg7qrMPm7)**

[**July 8****, 2011:** STS-135, the last flight of the orbiter Atlantis, marked the grand finale of the Space Shuttle program. This historic event, documented by NASA, commemorates the culmination of an era in space exploration. The final mission, undertaken by the Space Shuttle Atlantis, was significant in paving the way for future endeavors and the evolution of spaceflight technologies.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ca430f8eae4042ca940c4fbf8f7db00d&_e=fK30yltn0s_OUBp6lmwKdszwpbhK5DXq5WvQsBObCJRx0LCc_bTF3ZnQoDv5R32xixhVQnO3Yhy78gN6ki2_qAK0o-bfDAIwdOEY_Mu-diLxaKf3l8perspSNKmUAFyxemNCDHgBUOIVSgzILbCqXgubVHvuYJ21a0g9PvaXAScujzmBURPazuqBtMm2u0FYyzCnRh_QaTqgo2zluEXksUdZWj0vc33kMVqKioFV5sd7dNV-SKAUvvruJ_IzJNI6TacRGCS_yw2wwOc6sUf902SRMx5MWYKDBy7wQvRakNE%3D) **Source -[nasa.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ca430f8eae4042ca940c4fbf8f7db00d&_e=fK30yltn0s_OUBp6lmwKdszwpbhK5DXq5WvQsBObCJRx0LCc_bTF3ZnQoDv5R32xixhVQnO3Yhy78gN6ki2_qAK0o-bfDAIwdOEY_Mu-diLxaKf3l8perspSNKmUAFyxemNCDHgBUOIVSgzILbCqXgxzuJ42PieJ3RoN2NHIeJr7F9QmOs7a8RkXeSecBvUcqbTMEblzfmPwaShFKCdnkhoWH12GIYo0diRNfVx9hBA32NZ6DgwajjpTS9p2k_RUXWfHPaJV9LsMCc0QpjWrA9lIbPZGSRX0xUFFMLejg-A%3D)**

name: Sherrod
subject: let me tell you about my pin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66182994/415579913/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk329-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTliNDZlMC1kMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7tye3XVNEEWLFyz7KC9j1kf7eqNyu7OvQrtnLPexIk=)
Friend,

On the lapel of my suits (suits that I admit are sometimes rumpled), I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage. It was given to me decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally – and to this day**, I wear this canary instead of the official Senate pin. Let me tell you why:**
In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners would bring canaries deep into the mines to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that _cared enough_ to protect them.
Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights and women’s rights, and civil rights. Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work, friend.
**I wear my canary pin as a symbol of all the progress we've made and as a reminder that our fight for the Dignity of Work – _all_ work – is far from over. ****This fight is why I'm running for reelection.**
**To defend my seat and keep up this important fight, I need grassroots support from folks like you. That's why I'm personally asking: **[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Democratic Senate majority, and continue making progress for workers and families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66182995/415579914/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk329-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTliNDZlMC1kMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7tye3XVNEEWLFyz7KC9j1kf7eqNyu7OvQrtnLPexIk=)
Thank you. I'm humbled to have folks like you standing alongside me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Sherrod
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66182996/415579915/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk329-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTliNDZlMC1kMzFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7tye3XVNEEWLFyz7KC9j1kf7eqNyu7OvQrtnLPexIk=)
---

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Our firefighters deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Sign our petition today
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)
Derek, Hazardous air quality is rampant as Canadian wildfires continue to burn.
Californians know firsthand what an urgent threat wildfires are. That’s why Katie has worked tirelessly in Washington to protect families in Orange County and across our country from living with the detrimental effects of natural disasters.
Last year, the House passed multiple proposals she introduced to:
* Bolster federal firefighter pay and benefits
* Extend a key federal program for water conservation efforts
* Streamline natural disaster research

Can you stand with Katie as she pushes Congress to increase compensation for the federal firefighters who risk their lives to ensure the safety of others?
**[Add your name to our petition and join thousands of grassroots supporters who are demanding lawmakers take the time and safety of our firefighters seriously and increase their pay and benefits ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230708-wildfire-petiton/?source=EMAJ08_2_PET_20230708_V1_F&t=2&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)**
**[Add Your Name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230708-wildfire-petiton/?source=EMAJ08_2_PET_20230708_V1_F&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)**
If Congress doesn't act soon, these first responders will face a major pay cut in **_just_ 85 days**. That same pay cut could cause us to lose up to 50% of our wildland firefighter workforce–putting Americans across the country at risk.
Katie has made disaster safety and preparedness a top priority throughout her time in Congress. But she needs our help to show her colleagues just how critical it is to boost federal firefighters’ pay and benefits.
**[If you’re with us, will you add your name to our petition to demand better pay and benefits for our federal firefighters?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230708-wildfire-petiton/?source=EMAJ08_2_PET_20230708_V1_F&t=3&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)
**[Add Your Name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230708-wildfire-petiton/?source=EMAJ08_2_PET_20230708_V1_F&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)**
More soon,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ08_2_PET_20230708_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=26184_3422442__te013&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=26184%2E3422442%2E_te013)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: I need to be blunt with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66183149/415580854/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk78-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjc5MjUxMS1kODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBBG7jXRtNAXXDQMwo995HuhjUHCWM8ABfjwpjI8osE=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66183150/415580855/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk78-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjc5MjUxMS1kODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBBG7jXRtNAXXDQMwo995HuhjUHCWM8ABfjwpjI8osE=)
Peter: During my time as president of Planned Parenthood, I watched Republicans attempt to pass horrific laws to control women's bodies.

But now that it has been more than one year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , I need to be blunt with you: **Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before****.**

In states across this country, Republicans are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive freedom – and Mitch McConnell and his allies have threatened to pass a national abortion ban if they take back Senate control.
Political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada – just like it did last year – which is why I’m reaching out today: **My friend, Sen. Jacky Rosen, is running for reelection. I’m working hard to help her win this fight, and I’m asking you to join me. **
The GOP knows the importance of Nevada, so they’re zeroing in on Jacky as a top target for defeat. She’s facing an uphill climb and won’t be able to defend her seat without grassroots support from people like you. **So please, Peter, I’m personally asking:[ Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Jacky’s campaign and Patty Murray's – to keep Nevada blue, defend the Senate, and restore reproductive freedom nationwide? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66183151/415580856/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk78-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjc5MjUxMS1kODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBBG7jXRtNAXXDQMwo995HuhjUHCWM8ABfjwpjI8osE=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and Patty Murray will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66183152/415580857/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk78-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjc5MjUxMS1kODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBBG7jXRtNAXXDQMwo995HuhjUHCWM8ABfjwpjI8osE=)

Last year, the GOP flooded Nevada’s Senate race with a staggering $55 million – and their handpicked candidate came within _less than 8,000 votes_ of winning. That’s a SLIM margin. There’s no question that Jacky’s race will be just as close – and likely even more expensive.

**That’s why she urgently needs grassroots resources as early in the election cycle as possible. So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today?**
**[Donate $5 now – or however much you can spare – to split between Jacky's campaign and Patty Murray's to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. This race couldn’t be more pivotal in the fight to protect reproductive freedom in America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66183156/415580861/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk78-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjc5MjUxMS1kODFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBBG7jXRtNAXXDQMwo995HuhjUHCWM8ABfjwpjI8osE=)**
Thank you,

Cecile Richards

So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today? = Thank you, Cecile Richards | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: Why is it called “gerrymandering,” anyway?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Back in 1812, Governor Elbridge Gerry of Massachusetts approved maps that were drawn to favor his political party. The maps included several politically-motivated districts – including one that was thought to resemble a certain amphibian.

**And so, by combining Governor Gerry’s name with the word “salamander,” the term gerrymandering was born.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66183676/415582902/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230708_FR_7i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNmM0ZGY2LWRjMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mZujQ3uVrxBuS4Wg2oz0fCxph3bLLGnd4SglAZA8oaY=)
---
**Now, more than 200 years later, politicians are _still_ manipulating maps.**

Gerrymandering distorts district lines to ensure members of one political party win a majority of seats, even if they only earn a minority of votes. This tactic can lead to some pretty strange shapes:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66183677/415582903/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230708_FR_7i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNmM0ZGY2LWRjMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mZujQ3uVrxBuS4Wg2oz0fCxph3bLLGnd4SglAZA8oaY=)
---
[**_Help fight for fair maps nationwide! Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66183678/415582904/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230708_FR_7i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNmM0ZGY2LWRjMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mZujQ3uVrxBuS4Wg2oz0fCxph3bLLGnd4SglAZA8oaY=)
**Whether you call it gerrymandering, map manipulation, rigging the system, or just plain cheating, the result is the same: Voters have less ability to elect leaders who reflect their values, and our democracy is undermined in the process.**

That’s why the NDRC is fighting across the country to end GOP gerrymandering – and we _urgently_ need your help to support our work.
**The fight for fair maps is happening right now. In fact, CNN called redistricting “The Hidden Dynamic That Could Tip Control of the House” because more than a dozen districts could be redrawn before the next election!

[_Our grassroots movement will help decide whether districts fairly represent the will of the voters, or if instead they allow politicians to secure unearned power. Will you join the fight for fairness by donating to the NDRC today?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66183679/415582905/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230708_FR_7i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNmM0ZGY2LWRjMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mZujQ3uVrxBuS4Wg2oz0fCxph3bLLGnd4SglAZA8oaY=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**President Obama said, “We have to end the practice of drawing our congressional districts so that politicians can pick their voters and not the other way around.”**

With your help, we can make that happen.

– The NDRC

clean_body: | Back in 1812, Governor Elbridge Gerry of Massachusetts approved maps that were drawn to favor his political party. The maps included several politically-motivated districts – including one that was thought to resemble a certain amphibian. And so, by combining Governor Gerry’s name with the word “salamander,” the term gerrymandering was born. | = Now, more than 200 years later, politicians are still manipulating maps. Gerrymandering distorts district lines to ensure members of one political party win a majority of seats, even if they only earn a minority of votes. This tactic can lead to some pretty strange shapes: = = Whether you call it gerrymandering, map manipulation, rigging the system, or just plain cheating, the result is the same: Voters have less ability to elect leaders who reflect their values, and our democracy is undermined in the process. That’s why the NDRC is fighting across the country to end GOP gerrymandering – and we urgently need your help to support our work. The fight for fair maps is happening right now. In fact, CNN called redistricting “The Hidden Dynamic That Could Tip Control of the House” because more than a dozen districts could be redrawn before the next election! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = President Obama said, “We have to end the practice of drawing our congressional districts so that politicians can pick their voters and not the other way around.” With your help, we can make that happen. – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I am really
proud of this.

We recently hit our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline — and after
looking at our fundraising numbers, it is clear that this is a grassroots
powered campaign — our average contribution this last quarter was just
$34, and 98% of our donations were under two hundred dollars.

Our campaign doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we rely on the
grassroots support of everyday folks who give what they can to propel us
forward. The overwhelming majority of our donations coming from grassroots
supporters means that we have the strength of the people who have elected
me to office to represent them — not corporate special interests.

When I first announced I was running for Senate, I knew I couldn’t do this
alone. It was going to take building the largest grassroots movement in
California history to take on this challenge.

And this team did not disappoint. From the very moment I announced my
campaign, people across the country had my back.

Through Kevin McCarthy’s attacks.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]CNN politics: McCarthy officially denies Schiff and Swalwell seats on House
Intelligence Committee

Through the sham vote to censure me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]NPR: House votes to censure Democratic Rep. Adam Schiff

And though Donald Trump’s repeated threats. This team has been there with
me the entire way — chipping in what you can and leading this campaign
towards victory. I couldn’t be more grateful.

I’m determined to run this campaign the right way — fighting back against
the baseless attacks from Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor
Greene, and the other MAGA extremists by showing a level of grassroots
support that they could never imagine.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]Can you join this grassroots team and help us fight for our shared
values in the U.S. Senate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=july2023_abs_em.Er_QPe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2467?c0=july2023_abs_em.x7hsU3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]EXPRESS DONATE $34

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=july2023_abs_em.GV7_Ed&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=july2023_abs_em.uY9sx1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=july2023_abs_em.YzqyCG&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=july2023_abs_em.aS6u8E&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230708_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2900%2E5257348%2Ekib4hl ]Privacy Policy

For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done.
**It’s true:** Just this year, we have won 19 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**
[Can you step up and chip in $7 or whatever feels right to elect state Democrats who will fight alongside Michelle Obama and Jill Biden?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4lT00Pu3ukFa464WtXUUTGm9WHesQcfTkbZZHqZu4IDEcvreOJkzmdNz5ZWvTrFrneEU6h42mWzoHkWyIwcchHNI5uoCvb7HIvXMH-z4qEWd1l4F6FAltf9fTLf6Vam-bpct5FY9OyXGjYtkcz2cbum2gLNX3sNOcCJZrheYv2XFgo83ch2x4sns1D2PpBkbbTrAevE4iAo6Y_UlD6Q2-a5UYJUVeg0D9O99H_o4d1HscQ2nCSm2B9jmVLElqUdPuW3R84IH5OA_z0f0UFkk2IaUh2dpGZpNPn3NwqLHdRc48gUTJVgdq1g2MV5cyzPHgito6MKAQN1ze5yuscBJRBPF1at_0asse-2AEkXc0PxYDq7Jmiwgy0L6mguecMMuuhEoV8Y_zWOJvDqU6-hqNy4WrKyJnwEK3U0Redk6p9RxySAsm3X0MLwWr98EB_aCGq0soRMX2gwnihoP8o4whnBGyet7NDDZdIQzAtp6U92yX4YYyJWRzv0xLgwT4UPaHBcBwp9ol18pEAimtpCVWEE/3xp/ewyjZNiySlOhlGEjgcnemg/h8/S_iykBoZfz_mIdG_UbhCML_tP-sXmPD7pEh-vqs4Ktg)

Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

clean_body: We are relying on our dedicated supporters to stand behind us and help us fight for democracy | | | | | FIRST: Former First Lady Michelle Obama sounded the alarm on the fight to save democracy. THEN: First Lady Jill Biden echoed her call to come together and defend democracy by expanding power in our state legislatures! BUT: Republicans all across the country are doing everything in their power to halt the expansion of democratic power, push their anti-democracy agenda in the states, and roll back all of our progress. SO NOW: We are relying on our dedicated supporters to stand behind us and help fight for democracy by electing state Democrats in places like yours and beyond. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done. It’s true: Just this year, we have won 19 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do. The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away. name: Chuck Grassley
subject: You need to hear this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
I have got to get this off my chest.

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=41e8d11217354d13bd59add109a1256f&_e=3aknm-FoTgVXE0-hhB4sx-A4pORSy__HAZell_FF8kNWB1AqgRPT1LXulrT9GqXpYBS55yAqnYWQYZQ3lhd36NA02koLrfC_kYejTI0oZ0nX4ZOZ_WPlwTEMlBAzqgd569EWqpRTSmAq1hEG4I0BuGPlmMA0sfjt0m4w33aPEKv9PiKLzb-aawEnciigES6DvU-9TCuzsD8UlBIIRXW_qdOy3EywXwtTFs6M6rReqtQRmEi6p77EIQX5nptNYUwOOS09HKIQ6wYDQYm0WBzYGp2k1B82ncwX6wTsAvYOrGk72o5k6n4eW2qO80B7j6T0GBlaVys20HEEqnWaxkQ1ldALPBS711hwkpp3r2wk-pc%3D)
---
Friend,

I hate to say this - but we missed our End of Quarter fundraising goal.

**This was one of the biggest pushes we 've had of the year so far -- and it is troubling to tell you we missed it. We are SO CLOSE to being able to show the Democrats that we are READY for them in 2024.**

I wanted to let you know how close we are to reaching our goal. **In fact -- we are only $250 away...**

We can't leave the race so close to the finish line. [**If you and nine other patriots contributed $25, we could make up lost ground and finish this quarterly deadline in a winning position.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=41e8d11217354d13bd59add109a1256f&_e=3aknm-FoTgVXE0-hhB4sx-A4pORSy__HAZell_FF8kNWB1AqgRPT1LXulrT9GqXpYBS55yAqnYWQYZQ3lhd36NA02koLrfC_kYejTI0oZ0nX4ZOZ_WPlwTEMlBAzqgd569EWqpRTSmAq1hEG4I0BuGPlmMA0sfjt0m4w33aPEKv9PiKLzb-aawEnciigES6DCh9l9W6yY2Xg4G8F3vNGfvAKt5Kafhp0mz68QD38fnpQEQypc6p6p-cBtlQNGQ2H2BH-MsCetvU-AOZ1NehlU_qhNXBVbY2E8oEhrZIu8M7kSRCqHzMnhD3PHHEEiL8gLQh-i9nC3hQD62BewdqDYVm6xF9Hl3EToMiqfS1sm3V3C7STujJWf1mkBht04sKM) | [**RUSH $25 TO MAKE THE DEADLINE** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=41e8d11217354d13bd59add109a1256f&_e=3aknm-FoTgVXE0-hhB4sx-A4pORSy__HAZell_FF8kNWB1AqgRPT1LXulrT9GqXpYBS55yAqnYWQYZQ3lhd36NA02koLrfC_kYejTI0oZ0nX4ZOZ_WPlwTEMlBAzqgd569EWqpRTSmAq1hEG4I0BuGPlmMA0sfjt0m4w33aPEKv9PiKLzb-aawEnciigES6DCh9l9W6yY2Xg4G8F3vNGfinax4XyIRA5UTslJCKmLQsfFbpKhqDTfwHNQnKYIB3VW23dF9MIrFRaT5mzpHANNssD9-jQCHX7NdkTY3GHpNCm3ohy1HrGCXBwKQK4GXvSD2bvVqn1m5BMJRbIc1XP92dbZYx_oteZNgn5pM26sldDRKo5wAsfArm6Sd6y2GHX)
---

With your support, we can hold our heads high this month, knowing that when the Democrats come after us, they'll run straight into **a solid wall of PATRIOTS ready to stop them from increasing their stranglehold on this nation.**

[**If you could chip in ANYTHING, I would appreciate it sincerely.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=41e8d11217354d13bd59add109a1256f&_e=3aknm-FoTgVXE0-hhB4sx-A4pORSy__HAZell_FF8kNWB1AqgRPT1LXulrT9GqXpYBS55yAqnYWQYZQ3lhd36NA02koLrfC_kYejTI0oZ0nX4ZOZ_WPlwTEMlBAzqgd569EWqpRTSmAq1hEG4I0BuGPlmMA0sfjt0m4w33aPEKv9PiKLzb-aawEnciigES6DCh9l9W6yY2Xg4G8F3vNGfpcqrOQFvrkl7WSqFfWcTLvim7LL8vxQ1F-VQm-zwdIjUWSGGPwwqqUM0AfLNf-S_dZ_pSAG-GJr65xQkD8rUomVs7vZnYlpPymnh5AyatvkyGqgrt21dIvuh_rrcqMuDd0-6o1_sI_loDonE7tuZfjzWbkmylKe2LxySuMja1UP)

Thank you, and God Bless,

Chuck Grassley
_Sent from my iPhone_

Republicans have an edge on us with fundraising, because they have no problem cozying up to corporate special interest groups or asking for big checks from their billionaire buddies. Democrats rely on the power of grassroots support. That means we have to work twice as hard to raise what Kevin McCarthy and his buddies can raise at one mega-donor fundraiser. It also means we rely entirely on YOU: our grassroots team. name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
Dead in the Water No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-acxld-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* AOC **[wants to impeach](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-y/)** SCOTUS.
* Biden wants to **[block the sun](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-j/)**.
* The FAA approved a [**flying car**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-t/).
* **[Mayor Pete](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-i/)** is an idiot.
* **[Riots in France](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-d/)** should be a warning for the US.
* **[Cocaine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-h/)** found at the White House.
* **[Judge orders Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-k/)** from cooperating with **[Big Tech](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-u/).**
* There were **[1.1 million background checks](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-o/)** for guns in June!
* The **[Ben& Jerry's boycott](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-x/) **is going great.
* Zuckerberg released a **[Twitter replacement.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-m/)**
* 77% of American youth are **[not eligible to serve](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-c/) **in the military.
* The location of the **[White House Blow](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-q/)** keeps changing.
* No one wants to eat **[these hot dogs.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-a/)**
* The WH Press**[Secretary is a liar.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-f/)**

### **Dead in the Water**
The global warming alarmists have found their next target: international shipping. **[They have discovered a new way to cut carbon emissions from cargo ships by 20 percent.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-z/)**
### **They Can't Be Serious**
The CDC official website published advice for trans and non-binary individuals on seeking guidance**[on how to "chestfeed" their infants.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-v/)** **Picture Book Citizen Test** The Biden administration is **[updating the test immigrants must pass en route to becoming American citizens](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-e/)** and expects to roll out the new version by the end of the year. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acxld-trhiujldw-yk/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

body:
I had to share this update with you.| | | Friend,

---
I told you that we raised $35 MILLION in the second quarter.

---
**_But I’ve since learned that we also came in FIRST PLACE in fundraising in the Republican primary._**

---
__Even with all of the special interest donors trying to buy the GOP nomination for a candidate who is approved by the Deep State, we still emerged on top!_
_
---
**That’s why I will continue to say that you should never, ever underestimate the power of your grassroots donation, Friend.**

---
_While we have cause to celebrate, RINOs are** _still_** moving forward with their plan to spend $370 MILLION to stop us in the primary – and I have a feeling they will now even try to spend more after hearing that we outraised all of their puppet candidates_.

Hi, Friend! Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2d870b1840834995bcdc8dc854819d87&_e=eEKrNIVehSV7psHVLwYdZHiSIkK4GS09OBBr0SSkZVsQv35amAHq3kxnffrbqEXufhcPSiAJM24DzS9IoHnTqHVXdLth2CccsGJCDYJ7AS58ucSTCwrn0mO283SYLtCpLdE3VnhaAetXy4pu7H3ivzPy7Cq_4JZqk-tJ68WYPv8sKo2a1KwS-NxJinwwG9IE47v2nEER4kPl_ZaWxJaKZDQxYBPXqTbK58lgMujTBO4KPYzpvxagcon0V_Zx-SSQlqp6lt4_SWJzYBqmWgLgzq_ftMgAXIBF97mJ9e-47WkhzR8Ss0DUYnbPV7W6yA-r2rVCGUr6Elk7M9EJ76A1V5l71nnT28_TS8EY151LV78amKJVtfNm-tWN1RlBA6YpjRM7wndBCZFquNpQKDMz6RnFadUwTzIlmh_1bUTEqI8%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Hi, Friend! Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We 're not just fighting to secure our future -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children. That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Friend, "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?" Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America. name: Rick Scott
subject: I stand with female athletes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
As the father of daughters, I’m proud to support Riley Gaines in her mission to protect women’s sports.

When my daughters were growing up, sports were an opportunity to bond with other women and have a safe space to push themselves physically on an even playing field.

**But now, Democrats want to destroy these opportunities for women.**

Riley’s incredible bravery to stand up for women in the face of violence and hate is something that we should all be incredibly proud of.

I will continue to stand by her - not just for my own family - but for every woman in America who wants to play the sport they love.

[**Join me today and help me continue to stand with Riley Gaines and DEFEND women’s sports!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=311b96bccb904ec790f3832a80cf53fd&_e=9e2uXtxek9_fX64E2tt8SGMH51esnDtyHFA_IDg98CDHeSnI-bYSB4ZTgOrHdR080yMEgE9O_erF7GlbagbD9Xj9l5HoOaKxt1Zbz-wZP-iW9pcHyzrHwp4uv0SqjPYc35ietmAki9XdPJZ04n1ZmikKpmi3t_GUf-rWQ8h8_zlvXpEw7EAzcKhtCHlCMGfITwxzgUGk0usg1hVaPdjHMsW7ssQpYmB1ZuKtUllTyP1_-xs8F-Parm1NT1CNQ-ZMfciIKuIjWMWSXzb4lTKfENaAVK4Pil7tulILYAtOSGq93FiSq4SRdgzCJQ7o4MfQABMoCRqY_I7pdnGASXAyLa9IaU83Jg5Ip4hjb4_VTcBzEQUizdwaxuaHgtFB_lY7) **This is a cause we MUST fight for.** [**Can we count on your support?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=311b96bccb904ec790f3832a80cf53fd&_e=9e2uXtxek9_fX64E2tt8SGMH51esnDtyHFA_IDg98CDHeSnI-bYSB4ZTgOrHdR080yMEgE9O_erF7GlbagbD9Xj9l5HoOaKxt1Zbz-wZP-iW9pcHyzrHwp4uv0SqjPYc35ietmAki9XdPJZ04n1ZmikKpmi3t_GUf-rWQ8h8_zlvXpEw7EAzcKhtCHlCMGfITwxzgUGk0usg1hVaPdjHMg4qKP6mlmKrDsndevmT6tenyp1_PNbAmvVm7BNDIjigsPiYOQP37l1BBvrYlGCX1g43BmykwvNs5kX9hFAPkqA2ZgMbuQN4HlyLKymlsIhB4qEecXlsllgNp1A5mZawMnDANSGN2jq1tn6OXqiZPtnu5pzO03_I1wdV5DOrHmYq) Thank you, Rick Scott
